source: There are few types of magic more unpredictable and difficult to control than Chaos magic. Chaos is the very element of unmaking, and the Chaos spells are the most terrible weapons of destruction imaginable. The caster can also call on the primal forces of Chaos to induce mutations in his/her opponents and even him/herself.
zh_cn: 很少有哪种魔法比混沌魔法更不可预测、更难以控制。混沌是代表毁灭的元素，而混沌法术是你能想象到的最可怕的毁灭武器。施法者还可以召唤混沌的原始力量，诱发对手甚至自身的突变。
context: There are few types of magic more unpredictable and difficult to control than Chaos magic. Chaos is the very element of unmaking, and the Chaos spells are the most terrible weapons of destruction imaginable. The caster can also call on the primal forces of Chaos to induce mutations in his/her opponents and even him/herself.,

source: Trump magic has, indeed, an admirable selection of teleportation spells. Since the Trump gateways can also be used to summon other creatures, Trump magic has an equally impressive selection of summoning spells. However, not all monsters appreciate being drawn to another place by Trump user.
zh_cn: 王牌魔法确实拥有令人赞叹的各种传送法术。由于王牌传送门也可用于召唤其他生物，王牌魔法同样拥有一系列令人印象深刻的召唤法术。然而，并非所有的怪物都乐意被王牌使用者强行拉到另一个地方。
context: Trump magic has, indeed, an admirable selection of teleportation spells. Since the Trump gateways can also be used to summon other creatures, Trump magic has an equally impressive selection of summoning spells. However, not all monsters appreciate being drawn to another place by Trump user.,

source: Craft magic can strengthen the caster or the equipments. These spells can greatly improve the caster's fighting ability. Using them against opponents directly is not possible.
zh_cn: 工匠魔法可以强化施法者自身或其装备。这些法术能极大地提升施法者的战斗能力，但无法被直接用来对付敌人。
context: Craft magic can strengthen the caster or the equipments. These spells can greatly improve the caster's fighting ability. Using them against opponents directly is not possible.,

source: Crusade is a magic of 'Justice'. It includes damage spells, which are greatly effective against foul and evil monsters, but have poor effects against good monsters.
zh_cn: 圣战魔法是“正义”的魔法。它包含许多伤害法术，对肮脏和邪恶的怪物效果极佳，但对善良的怪物则效果甚微。
context: Crusade is a magic of 'Justice'. It includes damage spells, which are greatly effective against foul and evil monsters, but have poor effects against good monsters.,

source: Music adepts affect the world around them by singing songs. There are two types of song; some have instant effects, while others have a continuous effect until SP runs out. But the latter type has a limit: only one song can be sung at a time.
zh_cn: 音乐学徒通过唱歌来影响他们周围的世界。歌曲有两种类型：有些有瞬间效果，而另一些则具有持续效果，直到施法者的 SP（法力）耗尽。但后者有一个限制：一次只能唱一首歌。
context: Music adepts affect the world around them by singing songs. There are two types of song; some have instant effects, while others have a continuous effect until SP runs out. But the latter type has a limit: only one song can be sung at a time.,

source: The books of Kendo describe about various combat techniques. When learning new techniques, you are required to carry the books, but once you memorizes them, you don't have to carry them. When using a technique, wielding a weapon is required.
zh_cn: 剑道秘籍上记载了各种战斗技巧。当你学习新的技巧时，必须携带相应的秘籍，但一旦你将它们熟记于心，就不需要再把它们带在身上了。使用这些技巧时，必须装备一把武器。
context: The books of Kendo describe about various combat techniques. When learning new techniques, you are required to carry the books, but once you memorizes them, you don't have to carry them. When using a technique, wielding a weapon is required.,

source: The books of Rage describe various techniques. To learn a new technique, you must perform a ritual of rage, destroying the book in the process. Once learned, you may use techniques without requiring the corresponding Rage book, but you will need to find many copies of each book in order to learn all of the techniques.
zh_cn: 狂怒之书描述了各种技巧。要学习一项新技巧，你必须执行一场狂怒仪式，并在过程中摧毁这本书。一旦学会，你可以在不携带相应狂怒之书的情况下使用这些技巧，但你将需要找到每本书的多个副本来学会所有的技巧。
context: The books of Rage describe various techniques. To learn a new technique, you must perform a ritual of rage, destroying the book in the process.

source:
'Protection Rate' means how much damage is reduced by your armor.
Note that the Protection rate is effective only against normal 'attack' and 'shatter' type melee attacks, and has no effect against any other types such as 'poison'.
 
'Dodge Rate' indicates the success rate on dodging the monster's melee attacks. It is depend on the level of the monster and your AC.
 
'Average Damage' indicates the expected amount of damage when you are attacked by normal melee attacks with power=60.
zh_cn:
‘防护率’(Protection Rate)是指你的护甲能减免多少伤害。
注意：防护率仅对普通的‘物理攻击’和‘粉碎’类型的近战攻击有效，对如‘毒素’等其他类型的攻击无效。
 
‘闪避率’(Dodge Rate)显示了你避开怪物近战攻击的成功率。它取决于怪物的等级和你自身的 AC（护甲等级）。
 
‘平均伤害’(Average Damage)显示了当你受到威力为 60 的普通近战攻击时，预计承受的伤害量。
context: 'Protection Rate' means how much damage is reduced by your armor.\\n

source: Fathered by a minor god, you gain no starting powers.
zh_cn: 作为某个不知名小神的后代，你没有获得任何初始能力。
context: me.subdesc = "Fathered by a minor god, you gain no starting powers.";

source: Aphrodite is the Greek goddess of love, beauty, pleasure, and procreation. You inherit her sex appeal. As such, your pets are more obedient and shopkeepers fawn over you in their efforts to please you. You may kiss monsters and they might even decide to follow you with slavish devotion, though sometimes this just angers them.
zh_cn: 阿佛洛狄忒是希腊神话中代表爱、美、欢愉与繁衍的女神。你继承了她的性感魅力。因此，你的宠物会更加听话，而店主们也会为了讨好你而对你阿谀奉承。你可以亲吻怪物，它们甚至可能决定奴性般地对你死心塌地，尽管有时候这只会激怒它们。
context: me.subdesc = "Aphrodite is the Greek goddess of love, beauty, pleasure, and procreation. "

source: Apollo has been variously recognized as a god of light and the sun, truth and prophecy, medicine, healing, plague, music, poetry, arts, archery, and more. You inherit powers of illumination and are completely immune to light based attacks. You are seldom blinded.
zh_cn: 阿波罗被广泛认为是光明与太阳、真理与预言、医药与治愈、瘟疫、音乐、诗歌、艺术、射箭等领域之神。你继承了光照的力量，并完全免疫基于光属性的攻击。你极少会被致盲。
context: me.subdesc = "Apollo has been variously recognized as a god of light and the sun, "

source: Ares is the bold son of Zeus and Hera, whose very name is feared and respected by warriors and citizens alike. His legendary combat prowess exceeds that of Zeus and Poseidon, but he is less skilled in wiles than the other Olympians. You inherit exceptional bonuses to combat and have a firm grip on your strength. Later in life, you will be able to fly into a berserk rage on command. However, your lust for combat decreases your stealth as you call out challenges to all that you meet. And your resistance to magic is suspect as well.
zh_cn: 阿瑞斯是宙斯与赫拉那狂放不羁的儿子，无论战士还是平民，听到他的名字都会感到敬畏。他传说中的战斗力甚至超越了宙斯与波塞冬，但在诡计方面他却不如其他奥林匹斯神灵。你继承了卓越的战斗加成，并牢牢掌控着你的力量。随着你的成长，你将能够随心所欲地进入狂暴状态。然而，由于你会向所有遇到的敌人大声挑战，你对战斗的渴望会降低你的潜行能力。此外，你对魔法的抗性也值得怀疑。
context: me.subdesc = "Ares is the bold son of Zeus and Hera, whose very name is feared and respected "

source: Artemis was often described as the daughter of Zeus and Leto, and the twin sister of Apollo. She was the Hellenic goddess of the hunt, wild animals, wilderness, childbirth, virginity and young girls, bringing and relieving disease in women; she often was depicted as a huntress carrying a bow and arrows. You inherit powers of archery and are very nimble. Your skills with the bow are unmatched and you shoot arrows with increased range and deadliness.
zh_cn: 阿尔忒弥斯常被描述为宙斯与勒托的女儿，也是阿波罗的孪生姐姐。她是希腊神话中代表狩猎、野生动物、荒野、分娩、童贞以及年轻女孩的女神，能为女性带来或消除疾病；她常被描绘成一位手持弓箭的女猎手。你继承了箭术的力量，且非常敏捷。你的弓术无人能敌，射出的箭矢具有更远的射程和更强的致命性。
context: me.subdesc = "Artemis was often described as the daughter of Zeus and Leto, and the "

source: Athena is the great goddess of wisdom and the protector of Athens. She was born of Zeus and the Titan Metis, and her cunning far surpasses that of the other deities. You inherit great clarity of thought and magic and will be able to cast spells more reliably than other mortals. And should you fail to cast a spell, you will pay a reduced casting cost rather than the full amount. You also have a firm grip on your mental prowess.
zh_cn: 雅典娜是伟大的智慧女神，也是雅典城的守护者。她是宙斯和泰坦神墨提斯所生，她的狡黠远超其他神灵。你继承了清晰的思维和魔法天赋，能比其他凡人更稳定地施放法术。而且，即使你施法失败，你也只需支付较少的法力成本，而不是全部。你同样也能牢牢掌控你的心智力量。
context: me.subdesc = "Athena is the great goddess of wisdom and the protector of Athens. She was "

source: Demeter is the goddess of the harvest, who presided over grains, the fertility of the earth, and the seasons. You gain powers of regeneration, healing, and temperance. Eventually, you will become resistant to the ravages of time.
zh_cn: 得墨忒耳是丰收女神，掌管着谷物、大地的肥沃以及四季。你获得了再生、治愈和节制的力量。最终，你将能抵御时间的摧残。
context: me.subdesc = "Demeter is the goddess of the harvest, who presided over grains, the "

source: Hades is Ruler of the Underworld. You gain resistance to nether forces, increased fortitude and have a firm grasp on your life and health.
zh_cn: 哈迪斯是冥界之王。你获得了对地狱力量的抗性、更强的韧性，并牢牢掌控着你的生命与健康。
context: me.subdesc = "Hades is Ruler of the Underworld. You gain resistance to nether forces, "

source: Hephaestus was the god of technology, blacksmiths, craftsmen, artisans, sculptors, metals, metallurgy, fire and volcanoes. Like other mythic smiths but unlike most other gods, Hephaestus was lame, which gave him a grotesque appearance in Greek eyes. He served as the blacksmith of the gods. You inherit powers of enchantment and protection. Your equipment will not suffer diminution by corrosion or magical attack.
zh_cn: 赫淮斯托斯是代表技术、铁匠、工匠、手艺人、雕塑家、金属、冶金、火焰与火山的神。与其他神话中的铁匠一样，但与大多数其他神灵不同，赫淮斯托斯是个瘸子，这在希腊人眼中给了他一副怪诞的容貌。他是众神的铁匠。你继承了附魔和防护的力量。你的装备不会因腐蚀或魔法攻击而遭受损耗。
context: me.subdesc = "Hephaestus was the god of technology, blacksmiths, craftsmen, artisans, "

source: Hera was the wife and one of three sisters of Zeus. Her chief function was as the goddess of women and marriage. You inherit great clarity of mind and capacity for magic. You are very wise and have a firm grasp on your magical energy, which is even augmented.
zh_cn: 赫拉是宙斯的妻子，也是他的三个姐妹之一。她的主要职责是作为代表妇女与婚姻的女神。你继承了极其清晰的头脑和魔法才能。你非常睿智，不仅能牢牢掌控你的魔法能量，甚至还使其得到了增强。
context: me.subdesc = "Hera was the wife and one of three sisters of Zeus. Her chief function "

source: Hermes, the Messenger, is the extremely cunning diplomat used by the Olympians to negotiate truces. With his Winged Sandals and his powerful magic, there is no place barred from him, and there is no way to detain him. You inherit great powers of motion and will never become slowed. Your stealth is better than your brethren and your speed will increase with experience.
zh_cn: 信使赫耳墨斯是奥林匹斯众神用来谈判停战的极度狡猾的外交官。凭借他的飞翼鞋和强大的魔法，没有任何地方能阻挡他，也没有任何方法能将他扣留。你继承了强大的运动能力，永远不会被减速。你的潜行能力优于你的同侪，且你的速度会随着经验的增长而提升。
context: me.subdesc = "Hermes, the Messenger, is the extremely cunning diplomat used by the Olympians "

source: Poseidon, Brother of Zeus, is Lord of the Seas and Storm. You inherit elemental protection and corrosive attacks that melt the armor of your foes.
zh_cn: 波塞冬是宙斯的兄弟，是海洋与风暴之主。你继承了元素防护能力以及能熔化敌人护甲的腐蚀性攻击。
context: me.subdesc = "Poseidon, Brother of Zeus, is Lord of the Seas and Storm. You inherit "

source: Zeus, King of the gods and ruler of Mount Olympus, is god of the Sky and Thunder, and nominal husband of Hera. You inherit increased stature and your divine birth will be marked by your aura of electricity. You also resist lightning.
zh_cn: 众神之王、奥林匹斯山的主宰宙斯，是天空与雷霆之神，也是赫拉名义上的丈夫。你继承了高大的身材，而你环绕的电击光环将彰显你神圣的出身。你还能抵抗闪电。
context: me.subdesc = "Zeus, King of the gods and ruler of Mount Olympus, is god of the Sky "

source:
Devicemasters are excellent with magical devices, but poor in most other skills. They may shoot or use melee in a pinch, but this will never be their forte; instead, they conquer through their arsenal of magical devices.
 
Each Devicemaster chooses to specialize in a particular class of devices, and will gain extra bonuses for speciality items. These bonuses include increased damage, increased speed of activation, extra resistance to charge draining, and even the ability to occasionally power these devices without consuming charges; each of these abilities becomes stronger with experience. In addition, speciality devices are easier to use, although all Devicemasters are also good with devices of other types.
 
Devicemasters have several useful device-related powers; they may detect magical devices from a distance, and gain the powerful talent of Recharging very early on. At higher levels, they gain the ability to move effects from one device to another, or to move magical essences from one item to another if they specialize in Potions or Scrolls. In times of desperate need, the Devicemaster may drain a speciality item of multiple charges at once; this greatly increases the power of the effect, but may destroy the device in the process.
zh_cn:
魔导大师（Devicemasters）非常擅长使用魔法装置，但在其他大多数技能上表现糟糕。他们在危急时刻也可能进行射击或近战，但这永远不会是他们的强项；相反，他们通过自己那由魔法装置组成的武器库来征服一切。
 
每个魔导大师都会选择专精某一种特定类型的装置，并会从这些专精物品中获得额外的加成。这些加成包括：增加伤害、提高激活速度、对装置被吸魔提供额外抗性，甚至偶尔能在不消耗充能的情况下启动这些装置；每一种能力都会随着经验的增长而变得更强。此外，专精的装置更容易被使用，尽管所有的魔导大师同时也精通其他类型的装置。
 
魔导大师拥有多项与装置相关的实用能力；他们能从远距离探测魔法装置，并在很早的时候就获得了强大的充能才能。在更高等级时，他们能够将一个装置的效果转移到另一个装置上，或者如果他们专精于药水或卷轴，他们也能将魔法精华从一个物品转移到另一个物品上。在极度绝望的时候，魔导大师可以一次性抽干专精物品的多次充能；这会极大地增强该效果的威力，但也可能会在这个过程中摧毁该装置。
context: Devicemasters are excellent with magical devices, but poor in most other skills.

source: It has unpredictable effects when you quaff it, either 1) curing 5000 HP and all temporary ailments, 2) increasing all stats, 3) decreasing all stats, 4) providing temporary light speed, 5) temporarily turning your skin to stone, 6) giving or curing mutations randomly, 7) repeatedly giving or curing mutations randomly, 8) temporarily making you gigantic, 9) triggering the Baby Foul Curse, 10) temporarily polymorphing you into an Ent, 11) making you hallucinate temporarily, 12) curing 420 HP and all ailments but making you hallucinate temporarily, or 13) exploding in your mouth for 11d66 damage, massive stunning and a dangerous wound.

zh_cn: 它会在你周围生成岩石。
context: if (desc) return "It surrounds you with rock.";

source: For a short time, monsters that attack you receive an equal amount of damage in retaliation.
zh_cn: 在短时间内，攻击你的怪物将受到同等伤害的反击。
context: if (desc) return "For a short time, monsters that attack you receive an equal amount of damage in retaliation.";
if (desc) return "A rumor is in it.";

source: It creates an artifact from a nameless weapon or armour when you read it. Gives better results on deeper levels. Don't be greedy - you will get only one artifact.
zh_cn: 阅读它能将一件未命名（非神器）的武器或护甲变成神器。在更深的楼层会有更好的结果。不要太贪心——你只会获得一件神器。
context: if (desc) return "It creates an artifact from a nameless weapon or armour when you read it. Gives better results on deeper levels. Don't be greedy - you will get only one artifact.";

source: It seems to be the hurried scribblings of a mad wizard on the verge of some great arcane discovery. You can't make heads or tails of it. Do you read it to see what happens?
zh_cn: 这似乎是一个处于伟大奥秘发现边缘的疯狂巫师匆忙写下的涂鸦。你完全摸不着头脑。你想读读看会发生什么吗？
context: if (desc) return "It seems to be the hurried scribblings of a mad wizard on the verge of some great arcane discovery. You can't make heads or tails of it. Do you read it to see what happens?";

source: It makes a chosen weapon, armor or ammo an ego item when you read it.
zh_cn: 阅读它能使所选的武器、护甲或弹药变成一件高级(ego)物品。
context: if (desc) return "It makes a chosen weapon, armor or ammo an ego item when you read it.";

source: It creates a huge fire ball centered on you.
zh_cn: 它会以你为中心制造一个巨大的火球。
context: if (desc) return "It creates a huge fire ball centered on you.";

source: It creates a huge ice ball centered on you.
zh_cn: 它会以你为中心制造一个巨大的冰球。
context: if (desc) return "It creates a huge ice ball centered on you.";

source: It identifies all items in your pack and gives temporary auto-identify.
zh_cn: 阅读它能鉴定你背包里的所有物品，并赋予临时的自动鉴定能力。
context: if (desc) return "It identifies all items in your pack and gives temporary auto-identify.";

source: It creates a huge ball of pure mana centered on you.
zh_cn: 它会以你为中心制造一个巨大的纯净法力球。
context: if (desc) return "It creates a huge ball of pure mana centered on you.";

source: It teleports all monsters in sight away unless resisted.
zh_cn: 除非被抵抗，否则它会将视线内的所有怪物传送走。
context: if (desc) return "It teleports all monsters in sight away unless resisted.";

source: It creates a temporary protective shield around your inventory.
zh_cn: 它会在你的物品栏周围生成一层临时的防护盾（防止物品被毁）。
context: if (desc) return "It creates a temporary protective shield around your inventory.";

notes: 宏与底层枚举名称，不可翻译

source: It does absolutely nothing at all.
zh_cn: 它什么都不会做，完全没有效果。
context: if (desc) return "It does absolutely nothing at all.";

source: It lights up nearby area or current room permanently.
zh_cn: 它能永久照亮附近区域或当前房间。
context: if (desc) return "It lights up nearby area or current room permanently.";

source: It maps your vicinity and lights up your current room.
zh_cn: 它能为你附近的区域绘制地图，并照亮你当前的房间。
context: if (desc) return "It maps your vicinity and lights up your current room.";

zh_cn: 它能为你附近的区域绘制地图。

source: It maps, lights permanently and detects all items on the entire level.
zh_cn: 它能为整个楼层绘制地图、永久照亮并探测所有物品。
context: if (desc) return "It maps, lights permanently and detects all items on the entire level.";

source: It detects all traps in your vicinity.
zh_cn: 它能探测你附近的所有陷阱。
context: if (desc) return "It detects all traps in your vicinity.";

source: It detects all visible monsters in your vicinity.
zh_cn: 它能探测你附近所有的可见怪物。
context: if (desc) return "It detects all visible monsters in your vicinity.";

source: It detects all objects in your vicinity.
zh_cn: 它能探测你附近的所有物品。
context: if (desc) return "It detects all objects in your vicinity.";

source: It detects all traps, doors, stairs, treasures, items and monsters in your vicinity.
zh_cn: 它能探测你附近所有的陷阱、门、楼梯、宝藏、物品和怪物。
context: if (desc) return "It detects all traps, doors, stairs, treasures, items and monsters in your vicinity.";

source: It detects all treasures in your vicinity when you use it.
zh_cn: 当你使用它时，它能探测你附近的所有宝藏。
context: if (desc) return "It detects all treasures in your vicinity when you use it.";

zh_cn: 当你使用它时，它能探测你附近所有隐形的怪物。
context: if (desc) return "It detects all invisible monsters in your vicinity when you use it.";

zh_cn: 当你使用它时，它能探测你附近所有的门和楼梯。
context: if (desc) return "It detects all doors and stairs in your vicinity when you use it.";

source: It detects all evil monsters in your vicinity when you use it.
zh_cn: 当你使用它时，它能探测你附近所有的邪恶怪物。
context: if (desc) return "It detects all evil monsters in your vicinity when you use it.";

source: It teleports you a short distance.
zh_cn: 它会将你传送到短距离之外。
context: if (desc) return "It teleports you a short distance.";

source: It teleports you a long distance.
zh_cn: 它会将你传送到长距离之外。
context: if (desc) return "It teleports you a long distance.";

source: It fires a beam that teleports all affected monsters away.
zh_cn: 它会发射一道光束，将被击中的所有怪物传送走。
context: if (desc) return "It fires a beam that teleports all affected monsters away.";

source: It teleports you to a nearby visible location.
zh_cn: 它会将你传送到附近一个可见的位置。
context: if (desc) return "It teleports you to a nearby visible location.";

source: It teleports you to a chosen location.
zh_cn: 它会将你传送到一个选定的位置。
context: if (desc) return "It teleports you to a chosen location.";

source: It provides a random means of escape.
zh_cn: 它会提供一种随机的逃生方式。
context: if (desc) return "It provides a random means of escape.";

source: It recalls you to the surface, or back into a dungeon you have entered.
zh_cn: 它能将你召回地表，或者将你送回你之前所在的地下城。
context: if (desc) return "It recalls you to the surface, or back into a dungeon you have entered.";

source: It turns a door, rock, or wall to mud.
zh_cn: 它能将门、岩石或墙壁化为泥土。
context: if (desc) return "It turns a door, rock, or wall to mud.";

source: It causes a massive earthquake nearby.
zh_cn: 它会在附近引发一场强烈的地震。
context: if (desc) return "It causes a massive earthquake nearby.";

zh_cn: 它会摧毁你附近的一切。

source: Attempts to remove from the level all monsters of a specified species, exhausting you.
zh_cn: 尝试将当前楼层内所有指定种族的怪物抹除，这会让你筋疲力尽。
context: if (desc) return "Attempts to remove from the level all monsters of a specified species, exhausting you.";

source: Attempts to eliminate all nearby monsters, exhausting you.
zh_cn: 尝试消灭附近所有的怪物，这会让你筋疲力尽。
context: if (desc) return "Attempts to eliminate all nearby monsters, exhausting you.";

source: It attempts to recharge a magical device using the mana of a source device.
zh_cn: 它会尝试使用源装置的法力为另一件魔法装置充能。
context: if (desc) return "It attempts to recharge a magical device using the mana of a source device.";

source: It attempts to recharge a magical device using your mana as the source.
zh_cn: 它会尝试消耗你的法力作为源泉，为一件魔法装置充能。
context: if (desc) return "It attempts to recharge a magical device using your mana as the source.";

source: It attempts to enchant a weapon, ammo or armor.
zh_cn: 它会尝试为一件武器、弹药或护甲附魔。
context: if (desc) return "It attempts to enchant a weapon, ammo or armor.";

source: It reveals all information about an item.
zh_cn: 它能揭示一件物品的所有信息（全面鉴定）。
context: if (desc) return "It reveals all information about an item.";

source: It probes all visible monsters' alignment, HP, AC, speed, current experience and true character.
zh_cn: 它能探明所有可见怪物的阵营、生命值、防御等级(AC)、速度、当前经验值以及真实性格。
context: if (desc) return "It probes all visible monsters' alignment, HP, AC, speed, current experience and true character.";

source: It sets a rune which will explode on a passing monster.
zh_cn: 它会放置一个符文，当怪物经过时会爆炸。
context: if (desc) return "It sets a rune which will explode on a passing monster.";

source: It creates a glyph that inhibits monsters from attacking you.
zh_cn: 它会生成一个能阻止怪物攻击你的结界符文。
context: if (desc) return "It creates a glyph that inhibits monsters from attacking you.";

source: It fills your belly with nourishing victuals.
zh_cn: 它能用营养丰富的食物填饱你的肚子。
context: if (desc) return "It fills your belly with nourishing victuals.";

source: It destroys all traps and doors in adjacent squares.
zh_cn: 它会摧毁所有相邻方格中的陷阱和门。
context: if (desc) return "It destroys all traps and doors in adjacent squares.";

source: It fires a beam which destroys traps and doors.
zh_cn: 它会发射一道光束，摧毁沿途的陷阱和门。
context: if (desc) return "It fires a beam which destroys traps and doors.";

source: It causes you to attack all adjacent monsters in a single turn.
zh_cn: 它能使你在一个回合内攻击所有相邻的怪物。
context: if (desc) return "It causes you to attack all adjacent monsters in a single turn.";

source: It lists all uniques on the current level.
zh_cn: 它能列出当前楼层中所有的唯一怪物。
context: if (desc) return "It lists all uniques on the current level.";

source: It lists all artifacts on the current level.
zh_cn: 它能列出当前楼层中所有的神器。
context: if (desc) return "It lists all artifacts on the current level.";

source: It attempts to teleport all visible evil monsters away.
zh_cn: 它会尝试将所有可见的邪恶怪物传送走。
context: if (desc) return "It attempts to teleport all visible evil monsters away.";

source: It teleports all monsters in sight away unless resisted.
zh_cn: 除非被抵抗，否则它会将视线内的所有怪物传送走。
context: if (desc) return "It teleports all monsters in sight away unless resisted.";

source: It pulls a distant item close to you.
zh_cn: 它能将远处的物品拉到你身边。
context: if (desc) return "It pulls a distant item close to you.";

source: It turns an item into gold.
zh_cn: 它能将一件物品变成金币。
context: if (desc) return "It turns an item into gold.";

source: It reveals information about your stats, resistances and life rating.
zh_cn: 它会揭示关于你的属性、抗性以及生命评级的信息。
context: if (desc) return "It reveals information about your stats, resistances and life rating.";

source: It removes a monster from current dungeon level unless resisted when you use it.
zh_cn: 除非被抵抗，否则当你使用它时，它会将一个怪物从当前的地下城楼层中抹除。
context: if (desc) return "It removes a monster from current dungeon level unless resisted when you use it.";

zh_cn: 它能赋予你临时的酸性抗性。
context: if (desc) return "It grants temporary acid resistance.";

zh_cn: 它能赋予你临时的闪电抗性。
context: if (desc) return "It grants temporary lightning resistance.";

zh_cn: 它能赋予你临时的火焰抗性。
context: if (desc) return "It grants temporary fire resistance.";

zh_cn: 它能赋予你临时的寒冷抗性。
context: if (desc) return "It grants temporary cold resistance.";

zh_cn: 它能赋予你临时的毒素抗性。
context: if (desc) return "It grants temporary poison resistance.";

source: It grants temporary resistance to the elements and poison.
zh_cn: 它能赋予你临时的对各种元素和毒素的抗性。
context: if (desc) return "It grants temporary resistance to the elements and poison.";

source: It gives temporary melee protection from evil creatures.
zh_cn: 它能为你提供抵御邪恶生物近战攻击的临时防护。
context: if (desc) return "It gives temporary melee protection from evil creatures.";

source: It heals you and gives temporary resistance to magic.
zh_cn: 它能治愈你的生命值，并赋予临时的魔法抗性。
context: if (desc) return "It heals you and gives temporary resistance to magic.";

source: It blesses you temporarily when you read it.
zh_cn: 当你阅读它时，能使你暂时受到祝福。
context: if (desc) return "It blesses you temporarily when you read it.";

zh_cn: 它能赋予你临时的英雄气概。

source: It causes you to enter a berserk rage, granting enhanced combat prowess but diminished stealth and skills.
zh_cn: 它能使你陷入狂暴状态，增强你的战斗力，但会降低你的潜行能力和各项技能。
context: if (desc) return "It causes you to enter a berserk rage, granting enhanced combat prowess but diminished stealth and skills.";

source: It grants a temporary speed boost.
zh_cn: 它能提供临时的速度提升。
context: if (desc) return "It grants a temporary speed boost.";

source: It grants temporary speed and heroism.
zh_cn: 它能赋予临时的速度提升和英雄气概。
context: if (desc) return "It grants temporary speed and heroism.";

source: It grants temporary speed, blessing and heroism.
zh_cn: 它能赋予临时的速度提升、祝福和英雄气概。
context: if (desc) return "It grants temporary speed, blessing and heroism.";

source: It temporarily grants you impossible powers of motion.
zh_cn: 它能暂时赋予你不可思议的运动能力。
context: if (desc) return "It temporarily grants you impossible powers of motion.";

source: It temporarily increases the damage dice of your melee weapon.
zh_cn: 它能暂时提升你近战武器的伤害骰数。
context: if (desc) return "It temporarily increases the damage dice of your melee weapon.";

source: It turns you int a wraith, giving the ability to pass through walls as well as reducing the amount of physical damage sustained from attacks.
zh_cn: 它能将你变成幽灵，赋予你穿墙的能力，并减少你受到攻击时的物理伤害。
context: if (desc) return "It turns you int a wraith, giving the ability to pass through walls as well as reducing the amount of physical damage sustained from attacks.";
notes: 修复了原文int的拼写错误

source: It generates barrier which completely protect you from almost all damages. Takes a few your turns when the barrier breaks or duration time is exceeded.
zh_cn: 它能生成一道屏障，使你完全免疫几乎所有的伤害。当屏障破裂或持续时间结束时，会消耗你几个回合的时间（僵直）。
context: if (desc) return "It generates barrier which completely protect you from almost all damages. Takes a few your turns when the barrier breaks or duration time is exceeded.";

zh_cn: 它会尝试召唤怪物来协助你。
context: if (desc) return "It attempts to summon monsters for assistance.";

context: if (desc) return "It attempts to summon a single undead monster to serve you.";

zh_cn: 它会尝试召唤一只恶魔来为你服务。
context: if (desc) return "It attempts to summon a single demon to serve you.";

context: if (desc) return "It attempts to charm a single monster.";

source: Trusted followers of mysterious ancient spirits known as the 'Purples', the Disciples roam the world running errands for their masters, learning mighty spells and receiving rare items as rewards for their work. There are three main flavors of Purple Disciples - disciples of Karrot, disciples of Yeqrezh, and disciples of a group of Purples known as the Troika. Each of the Purples expects different things of their Disciples, and each helps them achieve their ends in very different ways.
zh_cn: 门徒（Disciples）是被称为“紫衣灵（Purples）”的神秘古老灵魂的忠实追随者。他们游荡在世界各地，为他们的主人们跑腿办事，学习强大的法术，并获得稀有物品作为对他们工作的奖赏。紫衣门徒主要分为三大派系——卡洛特（Karrot）的门徒、耶克雷兹（Yeqrezh）的门徒，以及被称为三巨头（Troika）的紫衣灵团体的门徒。每一位紫衣灵对他们门徒的期望都不尽相同，并且都会以截然不同的方式来帮助门徒达成他们的目标。
context: Trusted followers of mysterious ancient spirits known as the 'Purples',

source:
Karrot is a proud and ambitious Purple, convinced that it is his destiny to one day rule the universe; but rather than getting personally involved, he has assigned to his Disciples the task of eliminating any potential rivals (like the Serpent of Chaos). Being so sure of his greatness, Karrot sees little reason to vary his habits and is the only one of the Purples to predictably teach all of his Disciples the same spells. Karrot occasionally assigns side-quests to his Disciples, with the dual aim of testing their mettle and removing lesser threats to his supremacy. These side-quests only appear on fairly challenging levels; they can be avoided by sticking to safer areas, but this will not make Karrot happy...

Karrot considers many artifacts to be his rightful personal property, and will claim them immediately if you should find them. He will, however, give you another artifact as a reward for your discovery. These replacement artifacts tend to start out as fairly weak, but eventually become very strong as you gain Karrot's respect by leveling up and by successfully completing side-quests. If you're really lucky and do a particularly good job, you might even receive the ultimate gift - Urog, Karrot's legendary blade of shadows!

Disciples of Karrot tend to play as fighter-mages, relying on melee, spells and devices alike. They are unique among Disciples in not having a mana pool; casting a spell takes a toll on their hit points instead. They are also the only Disciples to have a charming spell - but the greatest of Karrot's followers are rumoured to eventually learn even rarer abilities...
Karrot's disciples depend on Intelligence to make their spells work.
zh_cn:
Karrot 是一位骄傲且野心勃勃的紫色 (Purple) 生物，坚信有朝一日统治宇宙是他的宿命；但他并不打算亲自动手，而是将消除潜在竞争对手（比如混沌之蛇）的任务交给了他的门徒 (Disciples)。由于对自己的伟大深信不疑，Karrot 觉得没必要改变他的习惯，并且他是唯一一个总是向所有门徒传授相同法术的紫色生物。Karrot 偶尔会给他的门徒分配支线任务，一方面为了测试他们的勇气，另一方面为了消除对他霸权的一些微小威胁。这些支线任务只会出现在相当有挑战性的层数上；你可以通过待在安全的区域来避开它们，但这会让 Karrot 很不高兴……

Karrot 认为许多神器是他理所应当的私有财产，如果你碰巧找到了它们，他会立即将其据为己有。不过，他会给你另一件神器作为你发现物品的奖励。这些替换用的神器一开始往往相当弱，但随着你通过升级和成功完成支线任务来获得 Karrot 的尊重，它们最终会变得非常强大。如果你运气极佳并且表现得特别出色，你甚至可能获得终极礼物——Urog，Karrot 传说中的暗影之刃！

Karrot 的门徒倾向于扮演战法师 (fighter-mage)，依赖近战、法术和魔法装置。他们在所有门徒中是独一无二的，因为他们没有法力池；施放法术会消耗他们的生命值。他们也是唯一拥有魅惑法术的门徒——但据说最伟大的 Karrot 追随者最终能学到更罕见的能力……
Karrot 的门徒依赖智力来施展他们的法术。
context: me.subdesc = "Karrot is a proud and ambitious Purple, convinced that it is his destiny "
notes: 背景剧情，Karrot 是游戏中的一位独特存在，类似于守护神/派系领袖

zh_cn: 念出一个不可名状的词语。你视野内所有邪恶宠物的士气都会暂时提升，并怀着新的狂热为你效劳。

source: Mana Thrust grants you an offensive ranged attack. With this power, you will have good early offense as well as the ability to scale the damage of the mana thrust quite considerably. No monster can resist the Mana Thrust; but unlike Energy Blast this attack is a bolt, so it only affects a single monster at a time and some monsters might reflect the spell back.
zh_cn: 法力冲击赋予你远程攻击能力。借此能力，你在游戏前期能有不错的输出，且其伤害成长相当可观。没有怪物能抵抗法力冲击；但与能量爆破不同，它是射线类攻击，每次只能影响单个怪物，且部分怪物可能反射该法术。
context: Mana Thrust grants you an offensive ranged attack.

source: Energy Blast grants you an offensive ranged attack. With this power, you will have good early offense as well as the ability to scale the damage of the blast quite considerably. The blast will produce an elemental ball whose type is of your choosing, although the range of choices will depend on how much focus you invest in the blast. Unlike most ball spells, this spell deals full damage to all monsters in its area of effect unless resisted, without any reduction away from the epicenter.
zh_cn: 能量爆破赋予你远程攻击能力。借此能力，你在前期能有不错的输出，且其爆炸伤害成长相当可观。爆破会产生一个元素球，其属性由你选择，可选范围取决于你在该法术上投入的专注度。与大多数球类法术不同，除非被抵抗，否则它对其效果区域内的所有怪物造成全额伤害，且伤害不会随距离中心点的变远而递减。
context: Energy Blast grants you an offensive ranged attack.

source: Psionic Seeing grants you considerable powers of detection. Depending on how hard you focus, you may detect monsters, traps, doors, stairs, and objects; with enough concentration you can map your surroundings, gain temporary powers of telepathy, or even map the entire level!
zh_cn: 心灵视界赋予你强大的探测能力。根据你投入的专注度，你可以探测怪物、陷阱、门、阶梯和物品；如果有足够的专注，你可以映射周围环境、获得暂时的心灵感应能力，甚至映射整个楼层！
context: Psionic Seeing grants you considerable powers of detection.

source: Psionic Clarity focuses the mind of the psion. While only active for a short while, this power lowers the casting costs of all other psionic powers, which can be quite useful later in the game; take it as an early option if you already have an eye on the endgame and have no need for more immediate returns.
zh_cn: 心灵澄澈能使灵能者的精神更加专注。虽然生效时间很短，但此能力会降低所有其他灵能法术的施法消耗，这在游戏后期非常有用；如果你已经着眼于游戏后期而不需要立竿见影的回报，可以尽早选择它。
context: Psionic Clarity focuses the mind of the psion. While only active for

source: Psionic Blending grants great powers of stealth. While active, you will be able to blend in with your surroundings and sneak up on many foes. With maximal focus, you may even suppress aggravation (from your equipment), though your stealth will still be somewhat disrupted.
zh_cn: 心灵融合赋予你极强的潜行能力。激活时，你将能够与周围环境融为一体，并潜行接近许多敌人。在最高专注度下，你甚至可以压制（来自装备的）激怒怪物效果，不过你的潜行能力仍会受到些许干扰。
context: Psionic Blending grants great powers of stealth. While active, you

source: Psionic Travel grants a wide array of teleportation powers. From inexpensive short-range 'blinking' to long-range escapes, you will have it all. Indeed, with great focus you will even be able to control your teleportation and choose where you land!
zh_cn: 心灵传送赋予你各种传送能力。从低消耗的短距离“闪现”到长距离的逃生，应有尽有。实际上，在高度专注下，你甚至能够控制传送并选择你的落点！
context: Psionic Travel grants a wide array of teleportation powers. From inexpensive short-range

source: Psionic Speed channels your mental energy into speed of motion, granting great powers of haste. With increased focus comes increased speed, and the total amount of haste can greatly exceed what is possible for other classes.
zh_cn: 心灵加速将你的精神能量转化为移动速度，赋予你极强的加速能力。专注度越高，速度越快，其提供的总加速量可远超其他职业的极限。
context: Psionic Speed channels your mental energy into speed of motion, granting great

source: Mind Wave unleashes the effects of your mental focus on all visible monsters as psionic energy, dealing unresistable raw damage and potentially stunning, confusing, frightening and paralysing monsters; as the attack operates directly against monsters' minds, these side effects can sometimes bypass normal resistances, but mindless monsters are not affected at all. This spell does not pack quite as much raw power as Psionic Storm, but the lower cost and ability to affect more monsters compensate for this.
zh_cn: 心灵震波将你的精神专注转化为灵能释放给所有可见的怪物，造成无可抵御的原始伤害，并可能使怪物震慑、困惑、恐惧和瘫痪；由于该攻击直接作用于怪物的心智，这些副作用有时能无视常规抗性，但无心智的怪物完全不受影响。此法术的直接威力不如心灵风暴，但较低的法力消耗和影响更多怪物的能力弥补了这一点。
context: Mind Wave unleashes the effects of your mental focus on all visible monsters as psionic energy,

source: Psionic Crafting channels your mental focus into an object, enchanting it in the process. With maximal focus, you can even craft excellent items!
zh_cn: 心灵制造将你的精神专注注入物品中，并在此过程中为其附魔。在最高专注度下，你甚至能制造出优秀的（excellent）物品！
context: Psionic Crafting channels your mental focus into an object, enchanting it in the

source: Psionic Storm unleashes your mental focus in a large, powerful ball of energy; this psionic energy not only deals unresistable damage, but can stun, confuse, frighten and even paralyze monsters, with a chance to bypass normal resistances. Mindless monsters are not affected.
zh_cn: 心灵风暴将你的精神专注释放为一个巨大且强大的能量球；这种灵能不仅造成无可抵御的伤害，还能使怪物震慑、困惑、恐惧甚至瘫痪，并有几率无视常规抗性。无心智的怪物不受影响。
context: Psionic Storm unleashes your mental focus in a large, powerful ball of energy;

source: Psychic Drain allows you to draw mental energy and focus from the magic around you. Whenever you are hit by a magic spell you will convert some of the damage into mana. This power has no effect on non-magical damage like breaths, rockets or melee.
zh_cn: 精神吸取允许你从周围的魔法中汲取精神能量与专注。每当你被魔法法术击中时，你会将部分伤害转化为法力。此能力对吐息、火箭或近战等非魔法伤害无效。
context: Psychic Drain allows you to draw mental energy and focus from the magic around you.

source: Psionic Disruption allows you to block the minds of others, hindering their ability to cast spells. But be warned: innate monster attacks (such as breaths, rockets and boulder throws) will not be affected!
zh_cn: 心灵干扰允许你阻断他人的心智，妨碍他们施放法术的能力。但请注意：怪物的固有攻击（如吐息、火箭和投掷巨石）不受影响！
context: Psionic Disruption allows you to block the minds of others, hindering their ability

source: Mental Fortress grants immunity to Dispel Magic and Anti-Magic. In addition, it increases the power of your spells.
zh_cn: 心灵堡垒赋予你对驱散魔法和反魔法的免疫力。此外，它还能提升你法术的威力。
context: Mental Fortress grants immunity to Dispel Magic and Anti-Magic. In addition, it

source: Mindspring greatly enhances your mana recovery.
zh_cn: 心灵源泉极大地提高你的法力回复速度。
context: Mindspring greatly enhances your mana recovery.

source: Welcome to <color:keyword>FrogComposband</color>, a dungeon exploration role-playing game. Your goal is to defeat the dreaded <color:keyword>Serpent of Chaos</color>, but before you can face it, you must battle many foes. Your first step is to create a character for this quest. The following screens will guide you through this process so that you may quickly begin playing. You can get general help at any time by pressing <color:keypress>?</color>.\n\n
zh_cn: 欢迎来到 <color:keyword>FrogComposband</color>，一款地下城探索角色扮演游戏。你的目标是击败可怕的<color:keyword>混沌之蛇（Serpent of Chaos）</color>，但在面对它之前，你必须战胜许多敌人。你的第一步是为这次冒险创建一个角色。接下来的界面将引导你完成此过程，以便你能尽快开始游戏。你可以随时按 <color:keypress>?</color> 来获取常规帮助。\n\n
notes: 创角界面欢迎词，保留所有颜色标签

source: Angels are heavenly beings on a holy mission. Their wings allow them to fly over chasms and pits. They are rarely fooled by invisibility, and become resistant to the elements as they mature. Their stats are truly awe-inspiring, and their divine magic extremely strong, offering good offense combined with detection, healing, melee enhancement and utility. Angels are one of the most powerful races, but they also gain levels extremely slowly.\n \nAngels have a humanoid body type; they use the same equipment slots as most normal player races, and have no innate melee attacks. Wisdom is their primary spell stat.
zh_cn: 天使是肩负神圣使命的天界生物。他们的翅膀允许他们飞越深渊与陷阱。他们极少被隐形欺骗，且随着成长会对元素产生抗性。他们的属性令人惊叹，神圣魔法也极为强大，不仅能提供优秀的攻击力，还兼具探测、治疗、近战强化及其他实用能力。天使是最强大的种族之一，但他们升级的速度也极其缓慢。\n \n天使属于类人型体质；他们使用与大多数普通玩家种族相同的装备槽，且没有天生近战攻击能力。感知是他们的主要施法属性。
context: Angels are heavenly beings on a holy mission. Their wings allow them to

source: Centipedes are natural creatures with many legs. As they evolve, they change colors, but not much else seems to differentiate the various forms. Perhaps you prefer blue to red or green? Eventually, once you have evolved into your ultimate evolutionary form, you will be able to change colors at will and thereby become very powerful indeed.\n \nAs a centipede, your main survival attribute will be the many pairs of boots you can wear. Hopefully, this will be enough.
zh_cn: 蜈蚣是多足的自然生物。随着不断演化，它们会改变颜色，但在不同形态之间似乎并没有太多其他的区别。也许你更喜欢蓝色而不是红色或绿色？最终，一旦你演化到最终形态，你将能够随意改变颜色，从而变得非常强大。\n \n作为一只蜈蚣，你赖以生存的主要优势在于你可以穿戴多双靴子。希望这足以让你活下去。

source:
Demons are powerful servants of evil and come in many forms. They rely on their devilish powers or their brutish strength to survive.
 
The various demonic races include the Balrogs, powerful demons of fire; the Servants of Khorne, mighty warriors of destruction; the Tanar'ri, weaker demons whose ultimate form has three sets of arms, but prefers to fight naked; and Cyberdemons, whose firepower is unsurpassable.
 
Demons cannot eat normal food, but must feast upon the remains of their human enemies. They are unaffected by the Eldritch Horror.
zh_cn:
恶魔是邪恶的强大仆从，形态各异。它们依赖自身的恶魔之力或残暴的力量来生存。
 
各种恶魔亚种包括炎魔（Balrog），强大的火焰恶魔；恐虐的仆从（Servants of Khorne），强大的毁灭战士；塔纳里（Tanar'ri），相对较弱的恶魔，其最终形态拥有六只手臂，但更倾向于赤身裸体战斗；还有赛博恶魔（Cyberdemons），它们拥有无可匹敌的强大火力。
 
恶魔无法食用普通食物，必须以人类敌人的遗骸为食。它们不受不可名状的恐怖（Eldritch Horror）影响。

source: Khorne's servants come in many forms and are powerful forces of melee. They know nothing save melee, and strike at all that dare oppose the will of their master. As they gain experience, Khorne rewards his servants with new and more powerful forms.
zh_cn: 恐虐的仆从形态各异，且是强大的近战力量。除了近战之外他们什么都不懂，并会击打任何敢于违抗他们主人的存在。随着经验的增长，恐虐会赐予其仆从更强大的新形态。

source: Tanar'ri were originally slave demons, but rose up to overthrow their masters. They generally take on a humanoid form and are classic demons full of malice and cruelty. The ultimate form for this demon is the Marilith, a female demon with three sets of arms and a serpent body capable of attacking with six melee weapons!
zh_cn: 塔纳里原本是奴隶恶魔，但奋起推翻了他们的主人。它们通常呈现出人形，是充满恶意和残忍的经典恶魔。这种恶魔的最终形态是六臂蛇魔（Marilith），这是一种拥有六只手臂和蛇身的女性恶魔，能够同时使用六把近战武器进行攻击！

source: Balrogs are demons of shadow and flame. Their evil knows no bounds. Their spells are the most powerful of all demonkind, and at very high levels they may even call forth fires directly from hell.

source: Cyberdemons are giant humanoid forms, half demon and half machine. They are a bit slow and move erratically, but their immense bodies and unsurpassable firepower more than make up for this. The walls of the dungeon reverberate with their heavy steps!\n\nCyberdemons are one of the very few monster races not to undergo evolution, and so almost all their might is available from the beginning, although they do gain even more strength later on and their offense becomes stronger with experience.
zh_cn: 赛博恶魔是半恶魔半机械的巨型人形生物。它们虽然有些迟缓且行动不规律，但其庞大的身躯和无可匹敌的火力足以弥补这一点。地下城的墙壁都在回荡着它们沉重的脚步声！\n\n赛博恶魔是极少数不经历演化的怪物种族之一，因此它们几乎所有的力量从一开始就可以使用，不过在后期它们会变得更加强壮，且其攻击力会随着经验的增长而提升。

source:
Dragons are powerful winged serpents. They are strong in combat, with razor-sharp claws and a bone-crushing bite; but even more legendary is their breath, which grows ever more deadly as the dragon matures.
 
Due to their non-humanoid bodies, dragons are unable to wear armor, gloves or boots; however, being creatures of magic, they may equip up to six rings. They can also wear a helmet, a light source, a cloak and an amulet. Because of these equipment restrictions, dragons may have a difficult time covering all resistances; but each dragon has at least one innate resistance, maybe even an immunity.
 
Dragons begin life in a weak form, being very young. As their bodies mature, their scales grow tough and their claws sharp. Their breaths become stronger and stronger, and they frequently gain additional magical powers and resistances. All dragons can fly, but younger dragons are not so quick as their elders.
 
With the exception of Steel Dragons, who are far less intelligent than their kin and rely on brute force only, each dragon may choose to specialize in a specific type of magic. These special dragon-magic realms do not require books to learn. The selection of a realm has a direct influence on the stats and skills of the dragon.
zh_cn:
龙是强大的有翼巨兽。它们在战斗中十分强大，拥有如剃刀般锋利的爪子和粉碎骨头的咬合力；但更具传奇色彩的是它们的吐息，这种吐息会随着龙的成长变得越来越致命。
 
由于并非人形身躯，龙无法穿戴盔甲、手套或靴子；然而，作为魔法生物，它们可以装备多达六枚戒指。它们还可以戴头盔、装备光源、披风和护身符。由于这些装备限制，龙可能很难兼顾所有的抗性；但每条龙至少拥有一个天生抗性，甚至可能是免疫。
 
龙出生时十分幼小，形态虚弱。随着它们的身体成熟，龙鳞会变得坚韧，爪子变得锋利。它们的吐息会越来越强，并且通常会获得额外的魔法力量和抗性。所有的龙都会飞，但幼龙不如成年龙那样敏捷。
 
除了钢铁龙（它们远不如同类聪明，完全只依赖蛮力）之外，每条龙都可以选择专精某种特定类型的魔法。这些特殊的龙魔法领域不需要书本来学习。领域的选择将直接影响龙的属性和技能。
context: Dragons are powerful winged serpents. They are strong in combat,

source: Dragons specializing in lore are seekers of knowledge. They are the most intelligent of dragonkind, and it is intellect that drives their magic. Armed with a vast array of detection and knowledge spells, dragons of lore seek power through knowledge. They eventually gain powers of telepathy and automatic object identification. Lore dragons are quick learners, and gain maturity much more rapidly than the rest of their kind.
zh_cn: 专精学识的龙是知识的探求者。它们是龙族中最聪明的，正是智慧驱动着它们的魔法。学识之龙掌握了大量探测和知识类法术，试图通过知识来获取力量。它们最终会获得心灵感应和自动鉴定物品的能力。学识之龙学习极快，比其他同类成熟得快得多。

source: The most powerful magical items have long been believed forged by dragonflame. The craft dragon gains powers of enchantment, and may even reforge artifacts into the objects of their choosing! Otherwise, craft dragons are not particularly powerful, as they trade melee and breath prowess for magical understanding. This focus requires great wisdom.
zh_cn: 长期以来，人们一直认为最强大的魔法物品是由龙焰锻造而成的。工匠之龙获得了附魔的力量，甚至可以将神器重铸为自己所选的物品！除此之外，工匠之龙并非特别强大，因为它们用近战和吐息的能力换取了对魔法的理解。这种专精需要极高的感知（Wisdom）。

source: Dragon scales have thwarted many a would-be dragonslayer. Naturally tough and resistant, the dragon's armor is even further enhanced by this realm. This specialization gives enhanced armor class, reflection, resistance to cuts and stunning, resistance to poison and life draining, and sustaining of several key stats, albeit not all at once. With all of these extra innate bonuses, the magic spells of this realm are few in number but serve to offer temporary defensive augmentations. Unlike their kin, dragons of this order prize agility above all else.
zh_cn: 龙鳞阻挡了许多潜在的屠龙者。本身就坚韧耐抗的龙铠在这一领域的强化下更进一步。这一专精能增强护甲(AC)、提供反射、对割伤和震慑的抗性、对毒素和生命吸取的抗性，以及维持几项关键属性的能力（尽管并不是一次性全部获得）。由于这些额外的先天加成，该领域的魔法法术数量较少，仅用于提供暂时的防御增益。与同类不同，这个派系的龙最看重敏捷（Agility）。

source: All dragons have a formidable presence and make fearsome opponents; but Domination dragons are truly a breed apart, seeking to bend and control the will of all they meet. Convinced of their right to rule, these dragons may subjugate the weak, terrify the uncertain, and stun the unwary with their awesome presence. They are the best dragons at controlling minions, and can summon mighty aid. Initially hostile monsters summoned to battle may switch sides when they notice whom they have been commanded to fight; and in the end, the dragon of domination may sever all oaths of allegiance, returning enemy summons to where they came from. Needless to say, dragons of this order value force of will above all else.
zh_cn: 所有的龙都拥有令人生畏的威压，是可怕的对手；但支配之龙真的是一个特殊的异类，它们试图扭曲并控制所有遇到的生物的意志。坚信自己拥有统治权的这些龙可以征服弱者、恐吓犹豫者，并用其惊人的威压震慑毫无防备者。它们是控制仆从的最强龙族，并且能召唤强大的援助。最初被召唤来参战的敌对怪物，当注意到它们被命令去对抗谁时，甚至可能会倒戈相向；最后，支配之龙可以斩断所有效忠誓言，将敌方的召唤物遣返原处。毫无疑问，这个派系的龙将意志力放在首位。

source: Death dragons are enemies of life itself, seeking to destroy all living creatures. With this realm, the dragon may bend their breath weapon to suit their necromantic desires, eventually breathing mastery over both death and life. At high levels, the death dragon's melee attacks gain a powerful draining effect against living creatures. This focus values strength above all else. This foul realm is only available to Shadow and Chaos dragons.
zh_cn: 死亡之龙是生命本身的死敌，试图摧毁所有活物。掌握了这一领域，龙就能将其吐息武器扭曲以迎合它们的死灵欲望，最终吐息出凌驾于生死之上的力量。在高等级时，死亡之龙的近战攻击将对活物产生强大的吸取效果。这种专精将力量（Strength）放在首位。这个邪恶的领域仅对暗影龙（Shadow dragon）和混沌龙（Chaos dragon）开放。

source: Red Dragons are elemental dragons of fire, and the second-strongest fighters among dragons. Their fiery breaths are the stuff of legends with damage unsurpassed. Even their bites are likely to burn their opponents, further enhancing their deadliness in melee. As the Red Dragon matures, it becomes more and more resistant to fire, eventually gaining total immunity.
zh_cn: 红龙是火焰元素的龙族，在龙族中是战力排行第二的战士。它们充满火焰的吐息是传说级别的存在，伤害无可匹敌。甚至它们的咬击也可能会烧伤对手，进一步增强了它们在近战中的致命性。随着红龙的成熟，它对火焰的抗性会越来越强，最终获得完全免疫。

source: White Dragons are to cold what Red Dragons are to fire. Their melee is awe-inspiring, and their icy breath can be felt even in their bite. Together with Red Dragons, they have the deadliest breaths among dragonkind; and they become more and more resistant to cold as they mature, eventually attaining immunity.
zh_cn: 白龙之于冰寒，正如红龙之于火焰。它们的近战能力令人敬畏，甚至在它们的咬击中也能感受到冰冷的吐息。与红龙一样，它们拥有龙族中最致命的吐息；并且随着它们的成熟，对冰寒的抗性会越来越强，最终达到免疫。

source: Blue Dragons are elemental dragons of lightning. Their breaths are as strong as those of their Red and White brethren, their melee somewhat weaker but still mighty, and their bites eventually shock their foes. Blue Dragons become more and more resistant to lightning as they mature, eventually gaining total immunity.
zh_cn: 蓝龙是闪电元素的龙族。它们的吐息与红龙和白龙同胞一样强大，虽然近战能力稍弱但依然强悍，且它们的咬击最终能电击敌人。蓝龙随着成熟对闪电的抗性会越来越强，最终获得完全免疫。

As the Black Dragon matures, its bites become corrosive, and it grows more resistant to acid until it reaches immunity.
zh_cn: 黑龙之于酸液，正如蓝龙之于闪电。它们的吐息与红龙、白龙和蓝龙同族一样强大；而且对酸液有抗性的怪物较少，这为它们提供了额外的机会。随着黑龙成熟，它的咬击具有腐蚀性，并且对酸液的抗性也会随之增强，直到达到免疫。

zh_cn: 绿龙是毒素元素的龙族。它们不如红龙或白龙强壮，但仍是可怕的对手。随着它们的成熟，其咬击会使敌人中毒。随着时间的推移，绿龙对毒素的抗性会越来越强，最终达到免疫。

source: Shadow Drakes are among the stealthiest of dragons. They are creatures of nether, and eventually evolve into Death Drakes and Spectral Wyrms. Their melee is the weakest among dragonkind and their breaths are also somewhat lacking, but they still make fearsome opponents. As they advance, these dragons gain the ability to pass through walls, and acquire several resistances including immunity to nether.
zh_cn: 暗影飞龙（Shadow Drakes）是龙族中最擅长潜行的种类之一。它们是幽冥生物，最终会演化成死亡飞龙（Death Drakes）和幽灵巨龙（Spectral Wyrms）。它们的近战能力在龙族中最弱，吐息也稍显欠缺，但依然是可怕的对手。随着不断晋升，这些龙将获得穿墙的能力，并获得多种抗性，包括对幽冥的免疫。

source: Law Drakes are powerful dragons of order. They can breathe sound or shards and eventually evolve into Great Wyrms of Law, though not as quickly as you might hope. Their breaths are much weaker than those of the elemental dragons, but far fewer monsters resist sound or shards. Their melee is also on the weak side by dragon standards, but most lesser creatures would be quite happy with it!
zh_cn: 律法龙（Law Drakes）是秩序的强力龙族。它们可以吐息音波或碎片，最终演化成律法上古龙（Great Wyrms of Law），尽管这可能没有你期望的那么快。它们的吐息比元素龙弱得多，但抵抗音波或碎片的怪物也少得多。以龙族的标准来看，它们的近战能力偏弱，但大多数弱小的生物要是拥有这种近战实力也会非常高兴！

As they mature, they gain the ability to pass through walls and become more and more resistant to light, darkness and confusion. They are fairly weak fighters and have the weakest breaths in all of dragonkind, except for Steel Dragons which cannot breathe at all.
zh_cn: 以太龙（Ethereal Drakes）是光明与黑暗的龙族。它们以不起眼的伪龙（Pseudo Dragons）形态开启生命，但会迅速演化成以太幼龙（Ethereal Drakes），然后是以太巨龙（Ethereal Dragons）。随着它们的成熟，它们获得了穿墙的能力，并且对光明、黑暗和混乱的抗性越来越强。它们的战斗力相当弱，而且拥有龙族中最弱的吐息——完全无法吐息的钢铁龙除外。

zh_cn: 水晶龙（Crystal Drakes）是具有奇异结晶形态的龙。它们吐息碎片，并用如剃刀般锋利的爪牙进行强有力的战斗。在高等级时，它们会获得反射的力量。

source: Bronze Dragons are wyrms of perplexity. While they are not quite as strong as most other dragons, they eventually confuse monsters with their bite attack; also, they become more and more resistant to confusion as they mature.
zh_cn: 青铜龙（Bronze Dragons）是令人困惑的巨龙。虽然它们不如大多数其他龙那么强壮，但它们的咬击最终能使怪物陷入混乱；此外，随着成熟，它们对混乱的抗性也越来越强。
context: Bronze Dragons are wyrms of perplexity. While they are not quite as strong as most other

source: Gold Dragons are wyrms of sound. While they are not quite as strong as most other dragons, they are able to breathe sound on command, stunning their foes; also, they become more and more resistant to sound as they mature.
zh_cn: 金龙（Gold Dragons）是音波巨龙。虽然它们不如大多数其他龙那么强壮，但它们能随意吐息音波，震慑敌人；此外，随着成熟，它们对音波的抗性越来越强。
context: Gold Dragons are wyrms of sound. While they are not quite as strong as most other

source: Steel Dragons are magical dragons formed from rock. As they mature, their form hardens from stone into steel. Needless to say, their armor class is phenomenal, but their dexterity actually decreases with maturity. Steel dragons begin life being susceptible to cold damage, though they will eventually outgrow this vulnerability. They are not as fast as other dragons and have no powers whatsoever, not even the ubiquitous dragon breath! But their fighting is impossibly strong, putting all the other dragons to complete and utter shame. They also have extremely high hitpoints.
zh_cn: 钢铁龙（Steel Dragons）是由岩石形成的魔法龙。随着成熟，它们的身躯从石头硬化成钢铁。不用说，它们的护甲(AC)极其惊人，但它们的敏捷属性实际上会随着成熟而下降。钢铁龙在出生时容易受到冰寒伤害，尽管它们最终会克服这种弱点。它们不如其他龙快，并且没有任何特殊力量，甚至连随处可见的龙息都没有！但它们的战斗力强得不可思议，让所有其他龙相形见绌、自愧不如。它们还拥有极高的生命值。

source:
Elementals are mindless creatures animated from a single elemental form. As a species, elementals can never be cut, and being virtually mindless they are immune to sanity blasting. They rarely feel fear, and are resistant to confusion and poison. In addition, they gain specific powers and abilities depending on their form.
 
Earth Elementals are slow, but gain AC bonuses due to their tough bodies. They are resistant to shards, and may even turn their skins to stone. At home in elemental earth, they may travel freely through rocky confines. Unfortunately, as they are made of earth, their magic potions frequently turn to mud!
 
Air Elementals are shockingly fast, but perhaps that is just the crackle of their electrified bodies? They may hurl bolts and balls of electricity at their enemies, and may even imbue their weapons with deadly lightning. However, being surrounded by lightning, rings, amulets, wands and rods are quickly destroyed!
 
Fire Elementals are somewhat fast (enough to run circles around their earthen brethren) and are cloaked in flames. They may attack with hell's fury, but need to be on the lookout for cold-wielding foes. Being surrounded by fire, they rapidly burn scrolls and staves to ash!
 
Finally, there are the Water Elementals, creatures able to conjure deadly water bolts. They are immune to stunning. Their attacks can be quite corrosive; but alas, sometimes their own armor corrodes as well. Water Elementals also have a unique energy system based on the speed of their internal water flow; fighting and the use of elemental powers excite them and turn them into a raging torrent, while resting or aimlessly splashing about slows them down again. High flow rates make water elementals stronger, but their armor sometimes gets caught in the flow and slips off!
zh_cn:
元素是由单一元素形态赋予生命的无心智生物。作为一个物种，元素永远不会受到割伤，而且几乎没有心智的它们免疫理智摧毁(sanity blasting)。它们极少感到恐惧，并且对混乱和毒素具有抗性。此外，它们根据自身形态的不同，会获得特定的力量和能力。
 
土元素行动缓慢，但由于身体坚硬而获得护甲(AC)加成。它们对碎片具有抗性，甚至能将皮肤变成石头。由于习惯了土元素环境，它们可以在岩石的阻碍中自由穿梭。不幸的是，因为它们是由泥土构成的，它们的魔法药水经常会变成泥巴！
 
气元素速度惊人，但这也许只是因为它们带电躯体的噼啪作响？它们可以向敌人投掷闪电射线和闪电球，甚至能将致命的闪电注入武器中。然而，由于被闪电包围，其携带的戒指、护身符、魔杖(wand)和魔棒(rod)会很快被摧毁！
 
火元素速度较快（足以绕着它们的土元素兄弟跑圈），并且被火焰笼罩。它们可以带着地狱的怒火发动攻击，但需要提防使用冰寒的敌人。由于被火焰包围，它们会迅速将卷轴和法杖(staff)烧成灰烬！
 
最后是水元素，这是一种能够召唤致命水流射线的生物。它们免疫震慑。它们的攻击具有很强的腐蚀性；但遗憾的是，有时它们自己的盔甲也会被腐蚀。水元素还有一套独特的能量系统，基于其内部水流的速度；战斗和使用元素力量会激发它们，使其变成汹涌的激流，而休息或漫无目的地溅水则会使其减速。高流速使水元素更强，但它们的盔甲有时会被卷入水流并滑落！

source: Earth Elementals are creatures of rock: Strong, tough and slow. They may move freely through the earth and are capable of conjuring sharp clods of earth to hurl at their foes. Their skin is very tough, and they can even turn their bodies to stone. However, being made of earth, their potions frequently turn to mud.
zh_cn: 土元素是岩石生物：强壮、坚韧且缓慢。它们可以在泥土中自由穿行，并能召唤尖锐的土块投掷向敌人。它们的皮肤非常坚韧，甚至能将身体变成石头。然而，由于它们是由泥土构成的，它们的药水经常会变成泥巴。
context: Earth Elementals are creatures of rock: Strong, tough and slow.

source: Air Elementals are creatures of electricity. They are incredibly fast, blinking in and out of sight as they shower their enemies with confusing and shocking blows. Electricity crackles menacingly about their nimble frames, tending to destroy rings, amulets, wands and rods.
zh_cn: 气元素是电力生物。它们速度极快，在视线中忽隐忽现，同时用令人困惑和震惊的打击像狂风暴雨般袭击敌人。电流在它们敏捷的身躯上发出威慑的噼啪声，往往会摧毁戒指、护身符、魔杖和魔棒。
context: Air Elementals are creatures of electricity. They are incredibly fast,

source: Water Elementals are creatures of water, able to modify this ubiquitous liquid into a deadly and often corrosive weapon of destruction. Fear their rage! They cannot be stunned. Their corrosive nature erodes any armor that gets too close.

context: Water Elementals are creatures of water, able to modify this ubiquitous

source: Fire Elementals are creatures of flame. They have a vast arsenal of flaming attacks with which to singe great foes. However, they must beware of cold based attacks! Being wreathed in flames, scrolls and staves are quickly burned to ash.
zh_cn: 火元素是火焰生物。它们拥有庞大的火焰攻击库，足以烧焦最强大的敌人。然而，它们必须提防基于冰寒的攻击！由于全身笼罩在火焰中，卷轴和法杖会很快被烧成灰烬。

source: Giants are humanoids of immense stature. There are several types of giants. Fire, Frost and Storm giants are elemental giants, and gain elemental resistances, slays and even attacks appropriate for their type. Titans are powerful immortal beings of legend; their attacks often confuse their foes, and they rarely fight alone. Finally, there are the mighty Hrus; they are so strong they can eventually crush the walls in their path, but their magical powers are fairly limited.\n \nGiants rely on their superior physical stature to pummel their opponents with mighty blows. Against a distant foe, giants are capable of hurling large boulders with devastating effect. Giants use the same equipment slots as most normal player races, and have no innate attacks.
zh_cn: 巨人是体型巨大的类人生物。巨人分为几种类型。火巨人、霜巨人和风暴巨人是元素巨人，它们会获得与其类型相符的元素抗性、屠杀属性，甚至攻击能力。泰坦是传说中强大的不朽生物；它们的攻击往往会使敌人陷入混乱，且它们极少单独作战。最后是强大的赫鲁（Hrus）；它们的力量大到最终能粉碎挡在路上的墙壁，但它们的魔法能力相当有限。\n \n巨人依靠卓越的身体素质，用沉重的击打痛击对手。面对远处的敌人时，巨人能够投掷巨大的巨石，造成毁灭性的效果。巨人使用与大多数普通玩家种族相同的装备槽，且没有天生攻击能力。
context: Giants are humanoids of immense stature. There are several types of giants.

notes: 巨人使用合适的武器提示

source:
Golems are creatures animated by powerful magics: living stone conjured to serve their creators. But you have broken loose and are running amok!
 
Golems are very slow when it comes to moving about; their non-movement actions also tend to be slow, but not to the same extent. They excel in melee despite being limited to a single (but mighty) blow; they can equip a weapon, but fight much better with their powerful fists. Golems have a very high armor class and possess good resistances; they are also resistant to magic, and become more resistant as they evolve, reducing the damage taken from all magical attacks.
 
There are several varieties of golem, all sharing a common evolutionary heritage. First there is the mighty Colossus, the biggest (and slowest) of their kind. Next is the Sky Golem, a creature of powerful magic, resistant to the ravages of time. Finally, there is the Spellwarp Automaton, a creature of utter destruction, almost completely immune to magic; unfortunately, this last form takes nearly forever to build.
zh_cn:
魔像是由强大魔法赋予生命的生物：被创造出来服务其主人的活石。但你已经挣脱了束缚，开始暴走！
 
魔像在移动时非常缓慢；它们的非移动动作往往也很慢，但程度较轻。尽管只能造成单次（但极具破坏力）的打击，它们仍在近战中表现出色；它们可以装备武器，但使用它们那双强有力的拳头战斗效果更好。魔像拥有极高的护甲(AC)并且具备良好的抗性；它们也对魔法具有抗性，并且随着演化抗性会越来越强，从而减少受到的所有魔法攻击伤害。
 
魔像有几种变体，它们都共享着共同的演化特征。首先是强大的巨像（Colossus），它们是同类中最大（也是最慢的）。其次是天空魔像（Sky Golem），一种拥有强大魔法的生物，能抵抗时间流逝的侵蚀。最后是法术扭曲机兵（Spellwarp Automaton），一种代表着彻底毁灭的生物，几乎完全免疫魔法；不幸的是，这最后一种形态需要近乎永恒的时间来构建。

source: Hydras are monsters with multiple heads. As they evolve, they grow additional heads, giving them extra attacks as well as the ability to wear more equipment (helmets and amulets). While not every head may wear a helmet and an amulet (imagine how powerful that would be!), each head is capable of attacking; so an 11-headed hydra can attack up to 11 times per round, provided it has enough strength and dexterity to command such a fearsome arsenal.\n \nHydras are not very magical, and so play much like warriors but with a few extra abilities. Five- and seven-headed hydras resist poison and gain a few poison-based attacks. Nine- and eleven-headed hydras are creatures of flame: they resist fire, their attacks burn, and they are capable of breathing fire among other flame-based attacks. All hydras regenerate extremely rapidly.
zh_cn: 蛇蜥是长有多颗头颅的怪物。随着演化，它们会长出更多的头，赋予它们额外的攻击次数以及佩戴更多装备（头盔和护身符）的能力。虽然并非每颗头都能戴上头盔和护身符（想象一下那该有多强大！），但每颗头都能发动攻击；因此，一只 11 头蛇蜥每回合最多可攻击 11 次，只要它有足够的力量和敏捷来驾驭如此可怕的武器库。\n \n蛇蜥并不精通魔法，因此玩起来很像战士，但多了一些额外能力。五头和七头蛇蜥抵抗毒素，并获得了一些基于毒素的攻击。九头和十一头蛇蜥是火焰生物：它们抵抗火焰，攻击附带燃烧效果，并且能够喷吐火焰以及进行其他基于火焰的攻击。所有蛇蜥的再生速度都极快。

source:
Jellies are acidic creatures, quietly patrolling their surroundings in search of objects to absorb. They are quite stealthy for most of their lives. They don't wear equipment on their bodies the way normal races do; instead, they are capable of absorbing objects into their gelatinous frames. In fact, each of their equipment slots (except their pseudopod) is capable of holding any type of equipment whatsoever, and the number of slots increases with experience. For attacking, jellies are capable of forming a single pseudopod which they may either use for grasping a normal melee weapon, or leave empty to use their innate acid-based attacks.
 
Rather than relying on sight, jellies use a little-understood sense of their surroundings which allows them to see in the dark with neither light nor infravision. So while jellies can equip a torch or lantern, there is little reason for them to do so.
 
Jellies feed off the objects they find, gaining nutrition in proportion to the weight of the object absorbed. They can eat rations of food if desired, but these are so light as to offer very little nutritional value. Jellies prefer to eat heavy armors and weapons. For convenience, destroyed objects are automatically eaten; and jellies never become bloated, their appetite being insatiable.
 
Jellies begin life as a small puddle of black ooze, with very little carrying capacity for equipment. However, they quickly evolve into a Gelatinous Cube and then into an Acidic Cytoplasm. Jellies take one additional, powerful evolutionary step late in life.
zh_cn:
果冻是酸性生物，静静地在周围巡逻以寻找可吸收的物品。它们在生命的大部分时间里都非常善于潜行。它们不像正常种族那样在身上穿戴装备；相反，它们能将物品吸收到其胶状躯体中。事实上，它们的每个装备槽（伪足除外）都能容纳任何类型的装备，而且槽位的数量会随着经验的增加而增加。在攻击方面，果冻能够形成一根单独的伪足，既可以用来握持普通的近战武器，也可以空着以使用它们天生的酸性攻击。
 
果冻并不依赖视觉，而是使用一种鲜为人知的感知能力来感知周围环境，这让它们能够在黑暗中无需光源或红外视觉也能看见。因此，虽然果冻可以装备火把或灯笼，但它们并没有什么理由这么做。
 
果冻以它们找到的物品为食，根据吸收物品的重量按比例获得营养。如果需要，它们也可以吃食物口粮，但这些口粮太轻，能提供的营养价值微乎其微。果冻更喜欢吃沉重的盔甲和武器。为了方便起见，被摧毁的物品会被自动吃掉；而且果冻永远不会变得饱腹，它们的胃口是永不满足的。
 
果冻在生命初期只是一小滩黑色的软泥，携带装备的能力极低。然而，它们很快就会演化成凝胶方块（Gelatinous Cube），然后再演化成酸性细胞质（Acidic Cytoplasm）。果冻在生命后期还会进行一次强大而额外的演化。

source:
Leprechauns are small, mischievous creatures, always scheming for gold. They are weak, but quick and stealthy. For combat, they prefer not to use weapons at all; rather, by keeping their weapon hand free, they may pilfer objects or gold from their foes and flee to safety, all in a single action. They are capable of fighting with normal weapons should the need arise, but one seldom hears of leprechauns inspiring fear in combat!
 
Leprechauns value riches above all else, and even begin the game with their legendary pot of gold. Leprechauns also have the luck of the Irish, and good drops are more common for them. For magic, the leprechaun has a few talents, even including some curses for offense; Malicious Leprechauns and Death Leprechauns are vile, evil creatures, after all. They are masters of teleportation and detection; and while their melee skills do not inspire much fear (except of poverty), they are great masters of bow and device alike. At high levels, they move with incredible speed and seem to be in multiple places at once. Dexterity determines the leprechaun's skill with their magic.
 
A leprechaun uses gold for spellcasting the way most characters use mana. Gold is also used to pay for recharging devices or to power mana branded weapons. In addition, increasing the amount of gold on hand increases the power of the leprechaun, granting extra blows per round, extra shots per round, and increased AC and life rating; sufficient gold even increases the power of magical devices. Needless to say, greed is good when you're a leprechaun!
zh_cn:
矮妖是矮小、喜欢恶作剧的生物，总是图谋着金子。它们虚弱，但行动迅速且善于潜行。在战斗中，它们更倾向于完全不使用武器；相反，通过保持持武手空闲，它们可以从敌人那里偷窃物品或金子并逃到安全的地方，这一切都在一个动作内完成。如果需要，它们也能用普通武器战斗，但很少听说矮妖能在战斗中让人感到恐惧！
 
矮妖将财富看得比什么都重要，甚至在游戏开始时就带着它们传说中的金罐。矮妖还拥有爱尔兰人的好运，掉落好物品的情况对它们来说更为常见。在魔法方面，矮妖有一些天赋，甚至包括一些用于攻击的诅咒；毕竟，恶意矮妖和死亡矮妖是卑鄙、邪恶的生物。它们是传送和探测的大师；虽然它们的近战技巧并不能激起太多的恐惧（除了对贫穷的恐惧），但它们是弓箭和装置的大师。在高级别时，它们以惊人的速度移动，仿佛同时出现在多个地方。敏捷决定了矮妖的魔法技能。
 
矮妖施法时消耗的是金子，就像大多数角色使用法力一样。金子还用于支付装置充能或为法力烙印武器提供能量。此外，增加手头的金子数量会增强矮妖的力量，赋予它们每回合额外的近战和射击次数，以及提高护甲(AC)和生命等级；充足的金子甚至能增强魔法装置的威力。不用说，对矮妖而言，贪婪是件好事！
context: Leprechauns are small, mischievous creatures, always scheming for gold.

notes: 玩家怪物形态攻击动作

source:
Liches are the undead forms of former sorcerers. Their magic is strong, but their fighting skills weak. As undead, they quickly gain resistance to cold, poison and nether, and these resistances increase as the lich evolves.
 
Liches are born with magical powers, and gain additional powers as they advance; of all the monster races, none can surpass the firepower of an Archlich, but managing to evolve that far can be a challenge. Intelligence is their primary spell stat.
 
Liches are humanoid, and so use the standard set of equipment items; but should they forgo the use of a normal weapon, they may touch their opponents for various powerful effects. Even with this deadly touch, though, melee will never be their strong suit.
zh_cn:
巫妖是昔日咒术师的不死形态。它们的魔法很强，但战斗技巧很弱。作为不死生物，它们很快就能获得对冰寒、毒素和幽冥的抗性，并且这些抗性会随着巫妖的演化而增强。
 
巫妖生来就拥有魔法力量，并在晋升时获得额外的力量；在所有怪物种族中，没有哪个能超过大巫妖（Archlich）的火力，但要成功演化到那一步是一项挑战。智力是它们的主要施法属性。
 
巫妖是类人生物，因此使用标准的装备物品集；但如果它们放弃使用普通武器，便可以触摸对手以产生各种强大的效果。不过，即使拥有这种致命之触，近战也永远不会是它们的强项。
context: Liches are the undead forms of former sorcerers. Their magic is strong,

source: Orcs are Morgoth's creation and the backbone of his armies. They are accustomed to caves and tunnels, and resist darkness but tend to be vulnerable to light. Orcs are ugly, brutish pillagers by reputation and should not expect much love from shopkeepers. Morgoth's spirit lives in orcs and drives them forward, making them hard to frighten. What orcs lack in stealth and subtlety they make up for with their sheer brute strength, and generally have little trouble brushing aside weak enemies like kobolds; yet in the deep dungeons, where the strongest fighters and most powerful magicians reside, orcs are rarely seen.
zh_cn: 兽人是魔苟斯（Morgoth）的造物，也是其军队的骨干。它们习惯于洞穴和隧道，能够抵抗黑暗，但往往对光明十分脆弱。兽人名声恶劣，被认为是丑陋、残暴的掠夺者，所以别指望能得到店主的好脸色。魔苟斯的精神存在于兽人体内并驱使它们前进，使它们很难被恐吓。兽人在潜行和细致方面的不足，完全由它们纯粹的蛮力所弥补，且在面对像狗头人这样的弱小敌人时通常能轻松将其扫除；然而，在最强壮的战士和最强大的魔法师居住的地下城深处，却很少能见到兽人的身影。
context: Orcs are Morgoth's creation and the backbone of his armies. They are

source: The most common and familiar type of orc, fighter orcs are feared around the world for their strength, endurance, brutality and low cunning. They start their careers as a lowly Snaga, but will eventually develop into Uruk-hai or even mighty warlords, capable of summoning and controlling armies of lesser orcs.
zh_cn: 作为最常见、最广为人知的兽人类型，战士兽人因其力量、耐力、残暴以及卑劣的狡猾而令世人畏惧。它们以卑贱的劣兽人（Snaga）开启生涯，但最终会演化成强兽人（Uruk-hai），甚至是能够召唤并控制下级兽人大军的强大督军。
context: me.subdesc = "The most common and familiar type of orc, fighter orcs "

source: Orc shamans and warlocks are more cunning than the average orc and have learned rudimentary magic from their black masters. They can detect threats, blink out of dangerous situations and easily dispatch weak enemies with their offensive spells, and are not quite as hopeless with magic devices as their fighter kin, but like all orcs they tend to have trouble when the going really gets tough.
zh_cn: 兽人萨满和术士比一般兽人更狡猾，并从它们的黑暗主人那里学到了基础的魔法。它们可以探测威胁、从危险境地中闪现逃离，并用攻击性法术轻松解决较弱的敌人，而且它们在魔法装置方面的天赋也不像战士同族那样毫无希望。但就像所有的兽人一样，当局势真正变得艰难时，它们往往会陷入困境。

source: The creations of some differently normal scientist who thought sentient blood-thirsty pumpkins would be a great idea, these creatures begin their lives as pumpkin-headed humanoids; over time, however, the pumpkin bloats and crushes the frail stick body underneath, leaving just a massive rolling fruit and an unquenchable desire to kill. Death pumpkins lack most normal equipment slots, but make up for it by the many lights they can store within their body. Also, the bites of the deadliest pumpkins are said to be vampiric...
zh_cn: 某些脑回路异于常人的科学家认为，创造出嗜血的有自我意识的南瓜会是个绝妙的主意。这些生物的生命最初表现为南瓜头的人形生物；然而随着时间的推移，南瓜会膨胀并压碎底下脆弱如树枝般的身体，只剩下一个巨大的、滚动的水果以及无法抑制的杀戮欲望。死亡南瓜缺乏大部分正常的装备槽，但作为补偿，它们可以在体内储存许多光源。此外，据说最致命的南瓜的咬击具有吸血能力……

source:
Spiders are stealthy monsters that prefer to wait for their prey. They have poisonous attacks and can weave sticky webs to entangle their enemies. They have eight legs, enough for four rings and two pairs of boots; they may also wear a helmet, an amulet, a cloak and even a suit of body armor (after slight adjustments, of course), but cannot wield a weapon or a bow. They also cannot equip light sources, but this is not an issue, as spiders are accustomed to the dark.
 
There are two paths of evolution for the spider: the Phase Spider and the Aranea. Araneas have greater fortitude and better stats, as well as powerful melee capable of paralyzing an opponent; but Phase Spiders compensate for their relative fragility with unsurpassed powers of teleportation.
 
All spiders begin in the very weak form of the Cave Spider. Lacking any special talents, the cave spider must play carefully if it is to survive.
zh_cn:
蜘蛛是喜欢伏击猎物的潜行怪物。它们有带毒的攻击，并且能编织黏性的网来缠住敌人。它们有八条腿，足以戴四枚戒指和穿两双靴子；它们还可以戴头盔、护身符、披风，甚至穿戴身体盔甲（当然，经过稍微调整），但不能挥舞武器或弓箭。它们也无法装备光源，但这不成问题，因为蜘蛛已经习惯了黑暗。
 
蜘蛛有两种演化路径：相位蜘蛛（Phase Spider）和阿剌克涅（Aranea，即蜘蛛精）。阿剌克涅拥有更强的坚韧和更好的属性，以及能够麻痹对手的强大近战能力；但相位蜘蛛用其无可匹敌的传送能力弥补了相对脆弱的体质。
 
所有蜘蛛都以非常虚弱的洞穴蜘蛛形态开始。由于缺乏任何特殊天赋，洞穴蜘蛛如果想要存活下来，就必须小心行事。
context: Spiders are stealthy monsters that prefer to wait for their prey.

zh_cn: 你感应到了潜在的猎物！

source: One of the mightier undead creatures, the Vampire is an awe-inspiring sight. Yet this dread creature has a serious weakness: the bright rays of sun are its bane, and it will need to flee the surface to the deep recesses of earth until the sun finally sets. Being undead, Vampires resist nether and have a firm hold on their life force; vampires also resists cold and poison, and darkness only makes them feel at home. Vampires are, however, susceptible to their perpetual hunger for fresh blood, which can only be satiated by sucking blood from a nearby monster.\n \nVampires gain access to various dark powers as they evolve. Of course, they gain a vampiric bite at a very early stage, as they must use this power to feed on the living. Killing humans with this power is also a means of perpetuating the vampire species, and many are the servants of a true prince of darkness! Vampires are rumored to have limited shapeshifting abilities and a powerful, hypnotic gaze.
zh_cn: 作为比较强大的不死生物之一，吸血鬼散发着一种令人敬畏的气息。然而这个可怕的生物有一个严重的弱点：明亮的阳光是它的克星，它必须逃离地表，躲进地下深处，直到太阳最终落山。作为不死生物，吸血鬼对幽冥具有抗性，并牢牢掌控着自己的生命力；吸血鬼还抵抗冰寒和毒素，而黑暗只会让它们有回家的感觉。然而，吸血鬼也会受到对鲜血永恒饥渴的影响，这只能通过吸取附近怪物的血液来满足。\n \n随着吸血鬼的演化，它们会获得各种黑暗力量。当然，它们在极早期就会获得吸血咬击的能力，因为它们必须利用这种力量以活物为食。用这种力量杀死人类也是繁衍吸血鬼物种的一种方式，并且它们中的许多都是真正黑暗王子的仆从！传闻吸血鬼拥有有限的变形能力和强大、催眠的目光。

source: Red Draconians have an affinity for fire, which they both breathe at will and resist. Together with their White kin, they are the strongest in combat of the draconians; but they are not so good with magic, and their stealth is quite poor. Should they choose the power of Dragon Skin, they will gain a fiery aura as well. Should they choose the power of Dragon Strike, their blows will burn their enemies.
zh_cn: 红龙人天生亲和火焰，它们不仅能随意喷吐火焰，对火焰也有抗性。与白龙人同族一样，它们是龙人中战斗力最强的；但它们不擅长魔法，潜行能力也很差。如果它们选择“龙皮”能力，也会获得火焰光环。如果它们选择“龙击”能力，它们的攻击将烧伤敌人。
context: me.subdesc = "Red Draconians have an affinity for fire, which they both breathe at will and resist. "

source: White Draconians have an affinity for frost, which they both breathe at will and resist. Together with their Red kin, they are the strongest in combat of the draconians; but they are not so good with magic, and their stealth is quite poor. Should they choose the power of Dragon Skin, they will gain an aura of cold as well. Should they choose the power of Dragon Strike, their blows will freeze their enemies.
zh_cn: 白龙人天生亲和冰霜，它们不仅能随意喷吐冰霜，对冰霜也有抗性。与红龙人同族一样，它们是龙人中战斗力最强的；但它们不擅长魔法，潜行能力也很差。如果它们选择“龙皮”能力，也会获得冰寒光环。如果它们选择“龙击”能力，它们的攻击将冻结敌人。
context: me.subdesc = "White Draconians have an affinity for frost, which they both breathe at will and resist. "

source: Blue Draconians have an affinity for lightning, which they both breathe at will and resist. They are strong in combat, but not so good with magic or stealth. Should they choose the power of Dragon Skin, they will gain a shocking aura as well. Should they choose the power of Dragon Strike, their blows will electrocute their enemies.
zh_cn: 蓝龙人天生亲和闪电，它们不仅能随意喷吐闪电，对闪电也有抗性。它们在战斗中很强，但不擅长魔法或潜行。如果它们选择“龙皮”能力，也会获得闪电光环。如果它们选择“龙击”能力，它们的攻击将电击敌人。
context: me.subdesc = "Blue Draconians have an affinity for lightning, which they both breathe at will "

source: Black Draconians have an affinity for acid, which they both breathe at will and resist. They are strong in combat, but not so good with magic or stealth. With the power of Dragon Strike, their blows will corrode their enemies.
zh_cn: 黑龙人天生亲和酸液，它们不仅能随意喷吐酸液，对酸液也有抗性。它们在战斗中很强，但不擅长魔法或潜行。有了“龙击”的力量，它们的攻击将腐蚀敌人。
context: me.subdesc = "Black Draconians have an affinity for acid, which they both breathe at will "

source: Green Draconians have an affinity for poison, which they both breathe at will and resist. They are average in all respects among the draconians. With the power of Dragon Strike, their blows will poison their enemies.
zh_cn: 绿龙人天生亲和毒素，它们不仅能随意喷吐毒素，对毒素也有抗性。在龙人中，它们各方面都处于平均水平。有了“龙击”的力量，它们的攻击将使敌人中毒。
context: me.subdesc = "Green Draconians have an affinity for poison, which they both breathe at will "

source: Bronze Draconians are the most intelligent of their kind, and the best with magic as well. They are seldom confused, though the same may not be said of their enemies. With the power of Dragon Strike, even the melee attacks of the Bronze Draconian will baffle their enemies.
zh_cn: 青铜龙人是同族中最聪明的，也是最擅长魔法的。它们很少陷入混乱，尽管它们的敌人可能就没这么幸运了。有了“龙击”的力量，即使是青铜龙人的近战攻击也会让敌人感到困惑。
context: me.subdesc = "Bronze Draconians are the most intelligent of their kind, and the best with "

source: Hard of skin, the Crystal Draconian is difficult to hit in melee; but their agility suffers, and they are not the brightest of their kind. They resist shards, which they may also breathe on command. With the power of Dragon Skin, they gain an aura of shards as well. With the power of Dragon Strike, even their melee attacks will shred their enemies.
zh_cn: 水晶龙人拥有坚硬的皮肤，在近战中很难被击中；但它们的敏捷度较低，也不是同族中最聪明的。它们对碎片有抗性，也可以随意喷吐碎片。有了“龙皮”的力量，它们也会获得碎片光环。有了“龙击”的力量，即使是它们的近战攻击也会撕裂敌人。
context: me.subdesc = "Hard of skin, the Crystal Draconian is difficult to hit in melee; but their agility "

source: The wisest of their kind, Gold Draconians are resilient in the face of magical attacks. They are resistant to sound, which they may also breathe at will, stunning their opponents. With the power of Dragon Strike, even their melee attacks will stun enemies.
zh_cn: 金龙人是同族中最明智的，在面对魔法攻击时具有很强的适应力。它们对音波有抗性，也可以随意喷吐音波，震慑对手。有了“龙击”的力量，即使是它们的近战攻击也会震慑敌人。
context: me.subdesc = "The wisest of their kind, Gold Draconians are resilient in the face of magical "

source: Lithe, stealthy and nimble, the Shadow Draconian is seldom seen in this world. They are resistant to the forces of nether, which they may also breathe. They are the weakest of the draconians, and the poorest in melee; but they are better than average with magic. With the power of Dragon Strike, they may steal life from their enemies in melee.
zh_cn: 身姿轻盈、隐秘且敏捷的暗影龙人在世上极其罕见。它们对幽冥的力量有抗性，也可以喷吐幽冥。它们是龙人中最弱的，近战能力也最差；但它们的魔法能力高于平均水平。有了“龙击”的力量，它们可以在近战中窃取敌人的生命。
context: me.subdesc = "Lithe, stealthy and nimble, the Shadow Draconian is seldom seen in this world. "

source:
The Rune-Knight is a mythical warrior, dedicated to the discovery of ancient runes that hold immense power. They may fix mystical runes of various types to their equipment in order to gain permanent bonuses; even artifacts can be improved this way! Alternatively, they may conjure a temporary rune which allows them to attack with enhanced effects, or place one directly on their person for a one-time or temporary bonus. Finally, they may alter their surroundings with various runes of change.
 
All runes (except <color:B>{Absorption}</color>) require mana for creation; however, unlike ordinary spellcasters, Rune-Knights do not regenerate mana on their own. Rather, they must siphon mana from magical or elemental attacks directed against them, and doing so requires the special rune of <color:B>{Absorption}</color>. This rune should be worn at all times, or at least kept handy.
 
Despite having mana, the Rune-Knight does not play like an ordinary spellcaster; they are more like a weaponsmith but can, on occasion, cast useful spells. If you have mana available, consider using these spells; otherwise, play as a warrior and wait to absorb mana. This can take time, depending on the foes you face, but the Rune-Knight's honor should prevent them from seeking out weak, defenseless spellcasters; and in any case, weak attacks can only take your mana so high.
zh_cn:
符文骑士是致力于发掘蕴含巨大力量的远古符文的传奇战士。他们可以将各种类型的神秘符文附加到装备上，以获得永久性加成；即使是神器也可以通过这种方式进行改良！此外，他们也可以召唤临时符文来强化攻击，或者将符文直接刻印在自己身上，以获得一次性或暂时的增益。最后，他们还可以使用各种变化符文来改变周围的环境。
 
所有的符文（<color:B>{吸收}</color>除外）在创造时都需要消耗法力；然而，与普通的施法者不同，符文骑士无法自行恢复法力。相反，他们必须从针对他们施放的魔法或元素攻击中汲取法力，而要做到这一点，就需要特殊的<color:B>{吸收}</color>符文。这个符文应该始终佩戴，或者至少随时备在手边。
 
尽管拥有法力，但符文骑士的玩法并不像普通的施法者；他们更像是一名武器匠，但偶尔也能施放有用的法术。如果你有充足的法力，可以考虑使用这些法术；否则，就当自己是个战士，等待吸收法力的时机。这可能需要一些时间，取决于你所面对的敌人，但符文骑士的荣誉感应该阻止他们去寻找弱小、毫无防备的施法者；且无论如何，微弱的攻击所能为你提供的法力上限也很低。
context: The Rune-Knight is a mythical warrior,
notes: 符文骑士职业背景描述
