source: <color:B>Melee</color> skills increase your ability to fight monsters in hand to hand combat. The total number of points spent in this group will determine your base fighting skill, as well as how much melee skill you gain with experience. In addition, this total gives bonuses to STR and DEX. The individual skills determine your base proficiency with the given type of weapon, as well as the maximum number of blows per round you may gain. For martial arts, the number of points determines your effective fighting level which is used to determine which types of hits you land.
zh_cn: <color:B>近战（Melee）</color>技能会提高你与怪物肉搏的能力。在这一类中投入的总点数将决定你的基础战斗技能，以及你随经验获得的近战技能成长。此外，该总点数还能为你提供力量（STR）和敏捷（DEX）加成。各个单独技能则决定了你对特定武器类型的基础熟练度，以及你每回合能获得的最大攻击次数。对于武术，投入的点数决定了你的有效战斗等级，用于判定你能打出哪些招式。
context: <color:B>Melee</color> skills increase your ability to fight monsters in hand to hand combat.

source: <color:B>Ranged</color> skills increase your ability to fight monsters using distance weapons such as bows and slings, as well as the ability to throw melee weapons effectively. The total number of points spent in this group will determine your base shooting skill, as well as how fast this skill increases with experience. Archery grants proficiency with the various classes of shooters as well as increasing your number of shots per round. Throwing grants the power to throw your leading melee weapon and perhaps have it return to you as well.
zh_cn: <color:B>远程（Ranged）</color>技能会提高你使用弓和投石索等远程武器与怪物战斗的能力，以及有效投掷近战武器的能力。在这一类中投入的总点数将决定你的基础射击技能，以及该技能随经验增长的速度。箭术（Archery）赋予你对各种远程武器的熟练度，并增加你每回合的射击次数。投掷（Throwing）则赋予你投掷主手近战武器的能力，并可能让其飞回到你手中。
context: <color:B>Ranged</color> skills increase your ability to fight monsters using distance weapons

source: <color:B>Magic</color> skills grant access to various spellcasting realms using INT rather than WIS as the spellcasting stat. Each point in a given realm increases your maximum spellcasting level as well as the decreasing the cost and fail rates of individual spells. You need not learn individual spells the way a mage might. Rather, you may cast any spell in a known realm provided your spellcasting level is high enough. The total number of points spent in this group provides a modest boost to device skills as well as increasing your INT. Unfortunately. this total also has a negative impact on your life rating, STR and CON.
zh_cn: <color:B>魔法（Magic）</color>技能允许你使用智力（INT）而非感知（WIS）作为施法属性来访问各种施法领域。在特定领域中每投入一点，都会提高你的最大施法等级，并降低各个法术的消耗和失败率。你不需要像法师那样去逐个学习法术。相反，只要你的施法等级足够高，你就可以施放已知领域中的任何法术。在这一类中投入的总点数能适度提升装置技能，并增加你的智力（INT）。不幸的是，该总数也会对你的生命等级、力量（STR）和体质（CON）产生负面影响。
context: <color:B>Magic</color> skills grant access to various spellcasting realms using INT rather

source: <color:B>Prayer</color> skills work like Magic skills, granting access to various realms of magic. However, prayer realms use WIS for the spellcasting stat rather than INT. Moreover, the total points in the Prayer group grants enhanced saving throws as well as increased WIS, but does not affect device skills or life rating. As in Magic, the number of points invested in a particular realm determines your maximum casting level and also influences casting costs and fail rates. Life magic is only available as a Prayer talent. The other prayer realms are duplicated as Magic talents, but you can only learn them in one way: as either INT based or WIS based.
zh_cn: <color:B>祈祷（Prayer）</color>技能的作用方式类似魔法技能，能让你访问各种魔法领域。然而，祈祷领域使用感知（WIS）而非智力（INT）作为施法属性。此外，在祈祷类别中的总点数会提供豁免加成以及感知（WIS）提升，但不会影响装置技能或生命等级。与魔法技能一样，在特定领域中投入的点数决定了你的最大施法等级，同时也会影响施法消耗和失败率。生命（Life）魔法只能作为祈祷天赋获得。其他的祈祷领域也作为魔法天赋存在，但你只能选择一种方式来学习它们：基于智力（INT）或基于感知（WIS）。
context: <color:B>Prayer</color> skills work like Magic skills, granting access to various realms of

source: There are various <color:B>Skills</color> important for every player, including stealth, perception, health and magic devices. While these skills may be influenced by talents in other groups (e.g. Magic increases your device skills), it is often desirable to directly increase these skills even more. In addition, you can directly improve your starting stats by investing in some of the skills in this group (e.g. Agility improves DEX while Health improve CON).
zh_cn: 有许多对每个玩家都很重要的<color:B>常规技能（Skills）</color>，包括潜行、察觉、健康和使用魔法装置。虽然这些技能可能会受到其他组别天赋的影响（例如，“魔法”能提高你的装置技能），但人们往往希望进一步直接提升这些技能。此外，你可以通过在这一类别的某些技能上投入点数来直接提升初始属性（例如，“敏捷”能提升DEX，而“健康”能提升CON）。
context: There are various <color:B>Skills</color> important for every player, including

source: There are various specialty <color:B>Techniques</color> which you may want to learn, including the Riding and Dual Wielding talents, as well as access to the Burglary and Kendo techniques. These latter two function like spell realms, using DEX and WIS respectively as their primary spell stat. Kendo also makes your mana function like that of the Samurai, and this behavior is used no matter what other Magic or Prayer realms you have learned. Note that Kendo still requires you to carry the appropriate spellbooks since you really are not samurai.
zh_cn: 你可能还想学习各种特色<color:B>特技（Techniques）</color>，包括骑乘和双持天赋，以及访问行窃（Burglary）和剑道（Kendo）特技的能力。后两者的运作方式类似于法术领域，分别使用敏捷（DEX）和感知（WIS）作为主要施法属性。剑道还会使你的法力运作方式变得像武士（Samurai）一样，无论你是否学过其他魔法或祈祷领域，这种特性都会生效。请注意，剑道仍然需要你携带相应的法术书，因为你毕竟不是真正的武士。
context: There are various specialty <color:B>Techniques</color> which you may want to

source: Many <color:B>Abilities</color> can be purchased for a single skill point. Often these grant an extra power which you may activate at will without cost, and usually without fail. Alternatively, abilities may grant a bonus such as regeneration or good fortune.
zh_cn: 许多<color:B>能力（Abilities）</color>只需花费一个技能点即可购买。这些能力通常会赋予你一项额外的力量，你可以随意激活它，无需消耗，且通常不会失败。另外，能力也可能赋予你某种加成，比如再生或好运。
context: Many <color:B>Abilities</color> can be purchased for a single skill point. Often

source: You must choose which <color:B>skills</color> to learn. The various skills are grouped into categories. Often, the total number of points in a given group determines broad level skills and perhaps grants boosts to your starting stats, while the specific skill points grant targetted benefits (such as proficiency with a class of weapons, or access to a specific spell realm). Details are given in the submenu for each group. Feel free to explore the various groups since you may always <color:keypress>ESC</color> to return here.\n\n
zh_cn: 你必须选择要学习的<color:B>技能</color>。各项技能被分成了多个类别。通常，特定类别中的总点数决定了广义级别的技能，并可能提升你的初始属性；而具体技能点则提供针对性的收益（例如对某类武器的熟练度，或访问特定法术领域的能力）。每个类别的子菜单中给出了详细信息。请随意探索各个类别，因为你随时可以按 <color:keypress>ESC</color> 返回这里。\n\n

source:
There are many races in the world, each, for the most part, with both strengths and weaknesses. In general, the stronger a race is, the higher its <color:keyword>Experience Penalty</color> and the longer it will take to gain levels.

For details on the <color:keyword>Stats</color>, see <link:birth.txt#PrimaryStats>. For information about the <color:keyword>Skills</color>, see <link:birth.txt#PrimarySkills>. The skill descriptions in this document are <color:v>for comparison purposes only</color>; they will tell you how good a race is compared to other races, but should not be taken as a literal indicator of the skill level your fledgling character will be born with. In general, skills are influenced by level, race, class, stats and equipment. See the race tables <link:Races.txt#Tables> below for a quick comparison of the various races.

source:
So, you feel ready to play as a monster? There are many monster races and subraces to choose from, and the various races are loosely grouped by type below: Animals, Dragons, Demons, and so forth.

As a monster, <color:v>you will not be able to choose a normal class;</color> your race will essentially be your class as well. Monsters do not use book spells, but many of them are magical in other ways; for example, fire dragons can breathe fire and may gain access to a range of non-book spells. Most monster types gain new spells, powers or abilities with experience; check out both the magic command (<color:keypress>m</color>) and the racial power command (<color:keypress>U</color>/<color:keypress>O</color>) to see what powers are available to you as you play.

Most monster races have custom body types, which may severely constrain the amount and kind of equipment you may wear. For example, a <color:keyword>Beholder</color> cannot wear armor or wield a sword... that would be an odd sight indeed! But to make up for this, they can wear up to eight rings on their eyestalks. Generally, details of this kind are described below.

Finally, all monsters <color:keyword>evolve</color>. When they gain enough experience, they will assume a more powerful form. To continue with our example of dragons, you might evolve from Baby to Young to Mature to Ancient and finally to a Great Wyrm, becoming vastly more powerful in the process. The stats and skills listed below assume a level 35 character.

For details on the <color:keyword>Stats</color>, see <link:birth.txt#PrimaryStats>. For information about the <color:keyword>Skills</color>, see <link:birth.txt#PrimarySkills>. To compare the various races at a glance, take a look at the race tables below (<link:MonsterRaces.txt#Tables>).
zh_cn:
那么，你觉得准备好扮演怪物了吗？有许多怪物种族和亚种可供选择，下面将这些各种各样的种族按类型粗略地分为了几组：动物、龙、恶魔等等。

作为怪物，<color:v>你将无法选择普通职业；</color>你的种族实际上也就是你的职业。怪物不使用书本上的法术，但其中许多在其他方面具有魔力；例如，火龙可以喷吐火焰，并可能获得一系列非书本上的法术。大多数怪物类型会随着经验的增长获得新的法术、力量或能力；在游玩时，可以通过魔法命令 (<color:keypress>m</color>) 和种族力量命令 (<color:keypress>U</color>/<color:keypress>O</color>) 来查看你可用的能力。

大多数怪物种族拥有自定义的体型，这可能会严重限制你可穿戴装备的数量和种类。例如，<color:keyword>眼魔（Beholder）</color>无法穿戴盔甲或挥舞剑……那景象也确实太怪异了！但作为补偿，它们可以在眼柄上戴上多达八枚戒指。通常，这类细节会在下文中描述。

最后，所有怪物都会<color:keyword>演化</color>。当它们获得足够的经验时，就会呈现出更强大的形态。继续以龙为例，你可能会从幼龙（Baby）演化为青年龙（Young）、成年龙（Mature）、上古龙（Ancient），最后成为巨龙（Great Wyrm），在此过程中变得异常强大。下面列出的属性和技能是假设角色为 35 级的情况。

有关<color:keyword>属性（Stats）</color>的详细信息，请参阅 <link:birth.txt#PrimaryStats>。有关<color:keyword>技能（Skills）</color>的信息，请参阅 <link:birth.txt#PrimarySkills>。如果想一目了然地比较各种族，请查看下方的种族表格（<link:MonsterRaces.txt#Tables>）。

source:
Your personality is the way you see and act in the world, and has a small but significant effect on your stats and skills. In general, you should pick a personality that complements the strengths and weaknesses inherent in your race and class. Most personalities only make a minor difference, but a few can change the game dramatically.

For details on the <color:keyword>Stats</color>, see <link:birth.txt#PrimaryStats>. For information about the <color:keyword>Skills</color>, see <link:birth.txt#PrimarySkills>. The skill descriptions in this document are <color:v>for comparison purposes only</color>; for example, your fledgling munchkin will not be born with <color:v>Amber[25]</color> melee skill. In general, skills are also influenced by level, race, class, stats and equipment. To compare the stat and skill boosts of each personality, take a look at the <link:Personalities.txt#Tables> personality tables below.
zh_cn:
你的性格是你在这个世界中看待事物和采取行动的方式，对你的属性和技能有着微小但重要的影响。通常，你应该选择一种能与你的种族和职业的先天优劣势互补的性格。大多数性格只会产生微小的差别，但少数性格会极大地改变游戏体验。

有关<color:keyword>属性（Stats）</color>的详细信息，请参阅 <link:birth.txt#PrimaryStats>。有关<color:keyword>技能（Skills）</color>的信息，请参阅 <link:birth.txt#PrimarySkills>。本文档中的技能描述<color:v>仅供比较之用</color>；例如，你初出茅庐的满级号（munchkin）角色出生时并不会真的拥有 <color:v>琥珀色[25]</color> 的近战技能。一般来说，技能还会受到等级、种族、职业、属性和装备的影响。要比较各种性格对属性和技能的加成，请查看下方的 <link:Personalities.txt#Tables> 性格表格。
context: fputs("Your personality is the way you see and act in the world, and has "
fputs("<topic:Tables><style:heading>Table 1 - Personality Statistic Bonus Table</style>\\n\\n", fp);

source: The Troika is a group of three closely related Purples working together - Guntujant, Uxip and Sohoglyth. Guntujant is a capricious Purple who follows the careers of his servants very closely, and rewards and punishes them seemingly at random; the powers gained by his followers are unpredictable, but generally quite strong. Uxip delights in combat, and grants Troika disciples their prodigious endurance and skill with two-handed weapons; however, a number of common items are an abomination unto Uxip, and cannot be used by followers of the Troika. Sohoglyth is a mysterious spirit, but a profoundly powerful one. She occasionally sets bonus quests for Troika disciples; if enough of the quests are completed with no failures, she will reward the questor with the power of telepathy, remote object quality sensing, or even walking through walls.\n\nTroika Disciples are in general very strong, especially in combat but also sorcery, yet the limitations placed upon them by Uxip and Guntujant also make them in some ways vulnerable. In particular, they frequently suffer random punishments, risk being punished if they teleport from a fight while not at low health, cannot wear a shield or cure poison with mushrooms, and must earn the right to use a rod of Detection. The spells of Troika disciples are unique in that they are not learned at any particular character level; instead, Guntujant and Uxip will teach them as a reward for killing dangerous enemies, especially uniques. Strength determines the spellcasting ability of a Troika disciple.
zh_cn: 三巨头（Troika）是由三位密切相关的紫色神明（Purples）组成的协同群体——冈图扬（Guntujant）、乌克西普（Uxip）和索霍格莉丝（Sohoglyth）。冈图扬是一位反复无常的紫色神明，他密切关注仆从的职业生涯，并看似随机地给予奖赏和惩罚；他的追随者获得的力量是不可预测的，但通常相当强大。乌克西普热衷于战斗，并赐予三巨头门徒惊人的耐力和双手武器技巧；然而，许多常见物品在乌克西普看来是可憎的，三巨头的追随者不能使用它们。索霍格莉丝是一个神秘而又极其强大的灵魂。她偶尔会为三巨头门徒设定额外任务；如果能在没有失败的情况下完成足够多的任务，她就会奖励探索者心灵感应、远程感知物品品质的能力，甚至是穿墙的能力。\n\n总的来说，三巨头门徒非常强大，尤其是在战斗和咒术方面，但乌克西普和冈图扬对他们施加的限制也在某些方面使他们变得脆弱。特别是，他们经常遭受随机惩罚，如果在非低血量时从战斗中传送逃跑就会面临被惩罚的风险，不能装备盾牌或用蘑菇解毒，并且必须通过努力才能获得使用探测魔棒的权利。三巨头门徒的法术很独特，因为他们不是在特定的角色等级学习法术的；相反，冈图扬和乌克西普会把法术作为杀死危险敌人（尤其是唯一怪物）的奖励传授给他们。力量决定了三巨头门徒的施法能力。
context: me.subdesc = "The Troika is a group of three closely related Purples working together - "

source: The undead are tough creatures, each having already survived death at least once. Warlocks who make a pact with Undead will find themselves gaining additional resistances such as cold, poison, darkness and nether. In addition, they will be able to see invisible monsters and gain resistance to life-draining forces. They will also gain access to undeadly powers, which typically involve detection and control over the forces of the netherworld. Eventually, this pact will allow its practitioners to destroy monsters with a single word, and, perhaps, to even partially leave the world of the living altogether. Of course, allying with the undead substantially reduces the warlock's ability to fight these creatures.
zh_cn: 不死生物是坚韧的怪物，每个都至少已经历过一次死亡。与不死生物签订契约的邪术师将发现自己获得了诸如冰寒、毒素、黑暗和幽冥等额外的抗性。此外，他们将能够看到隐形的怪物，并获得对吸取生命力量的抵抗力。他们还能获得不死力量，这通常涉及对幽冥世界力量的探测和控制。最终，这个契约将允许其修行者用一个词就摧毁怪物，甚至可能完全部分地脱离活人的世界。当然，与不死生物结盟会大幅降低邪术师对抗这些怪物的能力。
context: The undead are tough creatures, each having already survived death at least once. Warlocks who make a pact
notes: 邪术师契约分支背景描述
龙吟曲名称后缀（如：英雄事迹之歌）

source: The bond between a Dragonrider and a Dragon is one of the strongest and most enduring ties seen the world over. Each draws strength, power, and encouragement from the other, and together they make a formidable foe. An alliance with Dragonkind enables this bond to form, and the Warlock of this pact gains impressive powers for mounted combat. Indeed, they are among the elite riders of the world, only slightly inferior to Cavalry and Beastmasters. But where they have a slight deficiency in skill (and perhaps in melee as well), they have a strong advantage in riding techniques and magical enhancements. Dragonriders favor the lance above all other weapons, and seek continuously the legendary 'Dragonlance' which they view as their long-lost birthright.
zh_cn: 龙骑士与龙之间的羁绊是世界上最强大、最持久的联系之一。他们从彼此身上汲取力量、权能和勇气，共同组成了一个可怕的对手。与龙族结盟可以形成这种羁绊，而签订此契约的邪术师将获得令人惊叹的骑乘战斗力量。事实上，他们是世界上首屈一指的精英骑手，仅略逊于骑兵（Cavalry）和驯兽师（Beastmaster）。但在他们技能（或许还有近战能力）略有不足的地方，他们在骑乘特技和魔法强化方面却拥有巨大的优势。龙骑士偏爱长矛胜过所有其他武器，并不断寻找传说中的“龙枪”，将其视为他们失落已久的与生俱来的权利。
context: The bond between a Dragonrider and a Dragon is one of the strongest and most enduring ties
notes: 邪术师契约分支背景描述

source: Angels are heavenly beings who use a variety of techniques to smite those they view as evil. Warlocks who make pacts with Angels will also find their saving throws significantly improved, and (eventually) their body almost immune to bolt-like effects. Since Angels are strongly aligned with the forces of good, making a pact with Angels will reduce damage done to all good monsters by a substantial amount.
zh_cn: 天使是使用各种特技来打击他们眼中的邪恶的天界生物。与天使签订契约的邪术师也会发现自己的豁免判定得到显著提升，并且（最终）其身体对射线类法术效果几乎免疫。由于天使与善良势力紧密结盟，因此与天使签订契约会大幅减少对所有善良怪物造成的伤害。
context: Angels are heavenly beings who use a variety of techniques to smite those they view as evil.
notes: 邪术师契约分支背景描述
法术反噬造成的伤害来源

source: Demons are crafty creatures of Hell, using whatever means at their disposal to bring down their enemies. Warlocks who make pacts with Demons will find their abilities to use all magical devices improved, and learn the ability to Recharge these devices at will. Eventually, Demon Warlocks attain the ability to crush walls beneath their footsteps, and even gain immunity to fire. Making a pact with Demons will reduce damage done to all demons by a substantial amount.
zh_cn: 恶魔是地狱中狡猾的生物，会使用任何可用的手段来击垮他们的敌人。与恶魔签订契约的邪术师会发现自己使用所有魔法装置的能力都得到了提升，并学会了随意给这些装置充能的能力。最终，恶魔邪术师将获得在脚下粉碎墙壁的能力，甚至获得对火焰的免疫。与恶魔签订契约会大幅减少对所有恶魔造成的伤害。
context: Demons are crafty creatures of Hell, using whatever means at their disposal to bring
notes: 邪术师契约分支背景描述

source: An alliance with hounds is sneakily strong: hounds are fast, stealthy and nimble, and the warlock will gain these attributes as well, in addition to basic elemental resistances. They also gain decent melee, and the ability to channel the unpredictable powers of the aether. Of course, Hound Warlocks may also call on their kin for assistance, though this may not be enough against the more difficult foes of the world. Still, wouldn't it be fun to have some of those annoying hounds on your side for a change?
zh_cn: 与猎犬结盟拥有令人意想不到的强大力量：猎犬快速、隐秘且敏捷，而邪术师也将获得这些属性，此外还能获得基础的元素抗性。他们还获得了不错的近战能力，以及引导不可预测的以太力量的能力。当然，猎犬邪术师也可以召唤同族来协助，尽管这可能不足以对抗世上更难缠的敌人。不过，能让那些烦人的猎犬站在你这边一次，难道不是件很有趣的事吗？
context: An alliance with hounds is sneakily strong: hounds are fast, stealthy and nimble,
notes: 邪术师契约分支背景描述
猎犬标志字符，不可翻译

source: Of all the icky, crawling things in the world, you have chosen to make an alliance with spiders? Sure, they are stealthy, and fast, and very adept at hiding. Able to extrude a fine sticky substance to ensnare the unwary, the spider lurks nearby, or so you assume since you very seldom see them. Moreover, many spiders are adept at the powers of teleportation, able to jump quickly from one location to another, which can be quite baffling to a would be predator. They are comfortable with both poison and nexus. They are a bit on the squishy side, though - that is, if you manage to catch one!
zh_cn: 在世上所有恶心、爬行的生物中，你竟然选择与蜘蛛结盟？没错，它们善于潜行、速度快，而且非常擅长躲藏。它们能分泌出精细的粘性物质来诱捕粗心大意的人，你就假设蜘蛛潜伏在附近吧，因为你很少能看到它们。此外，许多蜘蛛擅长传送的力量，能够迅速从一个地点跳跃到另一个地点，这常常让试图捕食它们的人感到非常困惑。它们对毒素和时空都很适应。不过它们的身体有点柔软易碎——前提是你能抓到一只的话！
context: Of all the icky, crawling things in the world, you have chosen to make an alliance
notes: 邪术师契约分支背景描述

source: An alliance with giants and titans grants impressive physical strength and fortitude, but other stats will generally suffer. Later in life, you will gain giant-like resistances including sound, shards and chaos. Your combat will be impressive; and like giants, you will favor heavy weapons. Oh, and you won't mind tossing a boulder or two should the need arise! This alliance offers much in the way of physical advantages, but very little in the way of magical abilities or skill. Warlocks with this alliance are excellent fighters, being nearly indistiguishable in skill from Warriors!
zh_cn: 与巨人和泰坦结盟能赋予你惊人的身体力量和坚韧，但其他属性通常会受到影响。在生命后期，你将获得类似巨人的抗性，包括音波、碎片和混沌。你的战斗能力将令人印象深刻；而且像巨人一样，你会偏爱重型武器。哦，还有，如果有需要的话，你也不会介意扔一两块巨石！这个契约提供了许多身体上的优势，但在魔法能力或技能方面却鲜有助益。签订此契约的邪术师是非常出色的战士，在技能上几乎与战士（Warrior）无法区分！
context: An alliance with giants and titans grants impressive physical strength and fortitude,
notes: 邪术师契约分支背景描述

source: The mighty axe! Your blows will cleave with damage unsurpassed. Specializing in axes gives great offensive prowess, especially when your axe is wielded with two hands. However, this speciality offers little in the way of utility. Kill quickly as your life depends on it!
zh_cn: 强大的斧头！你的打击将以无可匹敌的伤害劈开一切。专精于斧头能提供极强的攻击能力，尤其是当你双手挥舞斧头时。然而，这种专精在实用性方面鲜有助益。尽快杀戮吧，因为你的生命取决于此！
context: The mighty axe! Your blows will cleave with damage unsurpassed.

source: You will shoot to kill! The bowmaster gains techniques to enhance shooting, including more rapid firing, the ability to volley shots over the heads of intervening monsters, reduced ammo destruction, the ability to kill with a single arrow and much more. As a shooter, your missile prowess will be quite formidable, though your melee will be somewhat lacking.
zh_cn: 你将为杀戮而射击！弓箭大师获得了增强射击的特技，包括更快的射击速度、越过中间怪物头顶进行齐射的能力、减少弹药损坏率、用一箭秒杀的能力等等。作为一名射手，你的远程能力将非常强大，尽管你的近战能力会略显不足。
context: You will shoot to kill! The bowmaster gains techniques to enhance shooting,

source: You will seek to club your opponents senseless! This speciality gains passive status effects against monsters, such as confusion, knock out and stunning. Also, you will gain some limited utility techniques. At high levels, your weapons will become more likely to score devastating, crushing blows against your hapless enemies.
zh_cn: 你将试图把对手砸得失去知觉！这种专精获得了针对怪物的被动状态效果，如混乱、击倒和震慑。此外，你还将获得一些有限的实用特技。在高等级时，你的武器将更有可能对不幸的敌人造成毁灭性的、粉碎性的打击。
context: You will seek to club your opponents senseless! This speciality gains passive

source: The crossbowmaster shoots deadly bolts for great damage. Their bolts may explode powerfully damaging nearby monsters. Also, they may shoot so hard as to knock their opponents backwards!
zh_cn: 弩大师能射出致命的弩箭，造成巨大伤害。他们的弩箭可能会发生威力巨大的爆炸，伤害附近的怪物。此外，他们射击的力度之大，甚至能将对手向后击退！
context: The crossbowmaster shoots deadly bolts for great damage. Their bolts may explode

source: A knife in the back! This speciality favors dual-wielding and rogue-type behavior. The daggermaster can even assume the posture of The Flying Dagger which greatly enhances their low level dagger toss capability. Indeed, their prowess with the dagger toss is legendary and appears almost magical! At high levels, you will also gain formidable melee prowess with the Frenzy Stance. Finally, daggermasters have very strong short ranged teleport techniques that synergize well with their toss abilities.
zh_cn: 背后捅刀子！这种专精偏好双持和盗贼般的行为。匕首大师甚至可以摆出“飞刀”架势，这极大地增强了他们在低等级时的匕首投掷能力。事实上，他们在投掷匕首方面的造诣是传奇级的，看起来几乎像魔法一样！在高等级时，你还可以通过“狂暴架势”获得强大的近战能力。最后，匕首大师拥有非常强大的短距离传送特技，能与他们的投掷能力很好地配合。
context: A knife in the back! This speciality favors dual-wielding and rogue-type behavior.

source: Specializing in shields gives excellent powers of defense and retaliation. In addition, you can even choose to melee with your shield rather than a normal weapon, bashing your opponents senseless. This form of combat is known as Shield Bashing and is unique to this speciality.
zh_cn: 专精于盾牌能提供极佳的防御和反击力量。此外，你甚至可以选择用盾牌而不是普通武器进行近战，把你的对手砸得失去知觉。这种战斗形式被称为“盾击”，是该专精独有的。

source: Watch out, Goliath! As a master of slings you will shoot pebbles with uncanny speed. Your shots may even ricochet off other monsters to score multiple hits. As with other archery specializations, your ammo will break less often.
zh_cn: 小心了，歌利亚！作为投石索大师，你将以不可思议的速度射出石子。你的射击甚至能从其他怪物身上弹射，造成多次命中。与其他射击专精一样，你的弹药损坏频率会降低。

You can vault into battle and circle kick enemies for stunning effects, attacking them with your boots! You may even eventually clone yourself at great cost.
zh_cn: 美猴王！你将用强大的法杖发出疾风骤雨般的打击来与对手战斗，并准备好反击敌人的攻击。你可以跃入战场并用旋风踢攻击敌人，用你的靴子踢出震慑效果！你甚至可以付出巨大的代价最终克隆自己。

zh_cn: 你将成为一名真正的剑术大师！对剑刃的精通将用元素、锋锐或吸血的力量增强你的武器。

source: A master of digging. You prefer rocky enclosures and don't mind lugging around a corpse or two, which you can bury in a pinch for a temporary bonus. You can choose one of several postures which allow you to use the digging bonus of your current weapon as an additional bonus, such as increased strength, constitution, or even speed! So keep your eye open for those +8 diggers!
zh_cn: 挖掘大师。你偏爱岩石包围的环境，也不介意随身拖着一两具尸体，在紧要关头你可以将它们埋葬以获得暂时的增益。你可以选择多种架势之一，这允许你利用当前武器的挖掘加成作为额外加成，例如增加力量、体质，甚至是速度！所以，留意那些 +8 挖掘属性的工具吧！

source: Disciples of Yeqrezh can choose five special gifts, one every ten levels. These gifts can take the form of new abilities, physical powers, or rare items; some can be chosen repeatedly, while others can only be picked once. Once you have selected a gift, you can never go back on your decision, so you might want to study this list to decide which gifts to choose for your character.\n\n
zh_cn: 耶克瑞什的门徒可以选择五项特殊天赋，每十级一次。这些天赋可以是新的能力、肉体力量或稀有物品；其中一些可以重复选择，而另一些则只能选择一次。一旦你选择了天赋，就无法更改，因此你可能需要仔细研究这个列表，来决定为你的角色选择哪些天赋。\n\n
context: fputs("Disciples of Yeqrezh can choose five special gifts, one every ten levels. "

source:
Yeqrezh is the friendliest of the Purples, supportive of his Disciples and willing to let them find their own way. Disciples of Yeqrezh will learn 20 spells over the course of the game - one every two character levels, apart from levels 10, 20, 30, 40 and 50; seventeen of these spells are offered by Yeqrezh, while the other three (at levels 16, 32 and 48) are chosen by you. Every ten levels, Yeqrezh offers direct help to his Disciples; depending on your choice, he can give you rare items or a permanent mental or physical ability, or share some of his life experience with you. Some of these abilities can be improved repeatedly, allowing you to accumulate exceptional mastery.

Disciples of Yeqrezh gain many practical tools as well as solid offensive options, and a useful item as a gift from their patron every odd-numbered character level. They are the most mage-like of all Disciples, and lack of hit points is their only true weakness. Nevertheless, they are extremely versatile, and can also win through melee, archery or even sneaking about silently collecting loot.

Yeqrezh is the recommended patron for new (or highly cautious) players, as he is the only Purple not to actively incentivize a demanding, push-the-envelope approach. Yeqrezh's disciples, like Karrot's, rely on Intelligence to power their spells.
zh_cn:
耶克瑞什是紫神中最友善的一位，他支持自己的门徒，并愿意让他们找到自己的道路。耶克瑞什的门徒在游戏过程中将学习到 20 种法术——除了 10、20、30、40 和 50 级外，每两个角色等级学习一种；其中 17 种法术由耶克瑞什提供，其余 3 种（在 16、32 和 48 级时）由你自己选择。每十个等级，耶克瑞什会直接帮助他的门徒；根据你的选择，他可以给予你稀有物品、永久的精神或肉体能力，或者与你分享他的一些生活经验。其中一些能力可以重复提升，让你积累非凡的熟练度。

耶克瑞什的门徒获得了许多实用工具和坚实的进攻手段，在每个奇数角色等级都能从他们的神明那里获得一件有用的物品作为礼物。他们是所有门徒中最像法师的，生命值较低是他们唯一真正的弱点。尽管如此，他们极其多面手，也可以通过近战、箭术甚至悄悄潜行收集战利品来取得胜利。

耶克瑞什是推荐给新手（或非常谨慎）玩家的神明，因为他是唯一一个不主动鼓励苛刻、极限挑战方式的紫神。与卡洛特的门徒一样，耶克瑞什的门徒也依靠智力来施放法术。
context: me.subdesc = "Yeqrezh is the friendliest of the Purples, supportive of his Disciples "
